Naku nari obusaasi;
Yesu niw’ abaragaza
Amarir’ aha maisho.

Omuri egyo nsi yait’ enungi
Ekibi tikibayo,
Bajwar’ emyend’ erikwera,
Bahimbisa Ruhanga.

Omwebembezi waitu Yesu,
Ogum’ otwebembere,
Oturaby’ omuri egi nsi,
Otuhitsy’ omu iguru.

songs.title: Ku turihurir’ enzamba
verses:
Ku turihurir’ enzamba ya Mukam’ omu iguru,
Ahari eryo izooba ry’aha muheru gw’ensi,
Eri abajunirwe boona bariteeraniraho,
Obwo haryabah’ okwet’ amaziina goona.

Boon’ abafeereir’ omuri Mukama baryazooka,
Basingwire rufu nk’oku yaagisingwire,
Babugabuganireyo n’abariba bariyo,
Haza naanye tindibura kubashangayo.

Ka tugume nituheereza Mukama wait’ ogwo,
Tweheyo kubuurir’ Engiri y’ omu ns’ egi;
Bwanyima ku turiheza kukor’ emirimo ye,
Aryatweta, naitwe tumushangy’ omu iguru.
songs.chorus:
Aha izoob’ ery’ obu Yes’ aryeta
Amaziina g’abantu be boona,
Omu kitab’ eky’ eky’amagara
Eryangye naryo riryaba ririmu.

songs.title: Hurir’ eihe ry’ab’omu iguru
verses:
Hurir’ eihe ry’ab’omu iguru nirihimbisa,
Niryeshongor’ ekyeshongor’ eki ekisya;
Rit’, ekitiinisa kyona kiheebwe Yesu
Owaatukunzir’, akasheesh’ eshagama.

Abo boona bakaba bari abasiisi nkaitwe,
Mbwenu boona bajwair’ emyend’ erikwera,
Bat’, ekitiinisa kyona kiheebwe Yesu
Owaatukunzir’, akasheesh’ eshagama.

Owaabair’ ari omugomi Yes’ amuhindura,
Amugir’ omunyamurw’, amushoroora.
Mbwen’ ekitiinisa kyona kiheebwe Yesu
Owaatukunzir’, akasheesh’ eshagama.

Kuri Yes’ atatukunda, tutakeeteisize,
Twena tukaabaire twehweir’ amatsiko.
Mbwen’ ekitiinisa kyona kiheebwe Yesu
Owaatukunzir’, akasheesh’ eshagama.

Mbwenu tugume tuhamye ku yaatujunire,
Haz’ abandi babone kumwikiriza;
Tut’, ekitiinisa kyona kiheebwe Yesu
Owaatukunzir’, akasheesh’ eshagama.

songs.title: Okuguma na Yesu
verses:
Okuguma na Yesu
Obutwire bwona
Kireet’ okushemererwa
Okutarihwaho.
Aha nsi ndi omugyenyi,
Tindigigumamu,
Kureka ndi omuhinguzi
Ninz’ ow’ omu iguru.

Okw’ owa Tataitwe
Nyowe niyo ndiza;
Mbwenu hati nindanzyayo
Ahabw’okwikiriza.
Ntuura n’ekihika
Kuhikayo juba
Omu buhunguzi bw’abo
Abeesiga Yesu.

Kand’ obund’ ebicu
Bireet’ omwirima,
Mbur’ ah’okuruhuukira
Nk’enkombe ya Nowa.
Ebingonz’ ahansi,
Haigur’emiyaga,
Byona bindabanisamu,
Binganzya munonga.

Bwanyim’ omushana
Gugaruka gujwa,
Ebingonzi n’emiyaga
Byona bicureera.
Omuhanganzima
Ogw’okumpuumuza
Gworekw’ omu maisho gangye,
Gungumy’ omutima.

Ebiro ti bingi
Yes’ ah’ ariizira
Kututwara twen’ owaitu,
Ei yaashemeize.
Hati ntegyereize
N’ekihika kingi
Kureeb’ Omujuni wangye
Ari aha ngoma ye.

songs.title: Yesu niwe Musingi
verses:
Yesu niwe Musingi ogw’Ekanisa ye’
Niwe Mukama waayo owaagyombekire,
Akarug’ omu iguru okugicungura
N’eshagama ye wenka, ngu eb’ omugore we.

Omu kubonabona n’omu ngamba zaayo
Etuur’ etegyereize omuheru gwabyo;
Bwanyim’ egyo Kanisa, ku arigisinguza,
Eryatung’ obusingye bw’ebiro n’ebiro.

N’obu eraab’ eri omu nsi, kwonk’ ekwataniise
Na Ruhanga n’abantu abaagwejegyeire.
Yesu, nitukushab’, otuhitsy’ omu iguru,
Tutuure hamwe naiwe, nk’ab’ abaahuumwire.

songs.title: Mukama, tukunda
verses:
Mukama, tukunda
Nyaruju yaaw’ egi,
Ei abantu baawe
Bateeraniramu.

Nimwo tushabira
N’omutima gumwe,
Kandi nitumanya,
Ku ori hamwe naitwe.

Aha ibatirizo
Naho tuhakunda;
Turagaaniraho
Endagaano naiwe.

Aha meeza yaawe
Niho twijukira
Eby’okufa kwawe,
Tukashemererwa.

Tukund’ Ekigambo
Kyaw’ eky’amagara;
Ku tukishomerwa,
Kitwongyer’ amaani.

Tweshongoreramu
Ebyeshongoro byaitu;
Kwonk’ eby’omu iguru
Byo biryabihita.

Okukira byona
Tube niiwe wenka
Twakunda munonga
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.

songs.title: Abarikwera b’omu nsi
verses:
Abarikwera b’omu nsi
Boona beeshongore
Hamwe nab’ abaaherize
Emirimo yaabo.

Ab’ensi n’ab’omu iguru
Twena turi eishe-emwe,
Ab’Ekanisa ya Yesu
Ei yaacungwire.

Ekitutaanisa nabo
N’ekyambu ky’okufa;
Abamwe baakyambukire,
Abandi nibambuka.

Abamwe bakahuumura,
Bari owa Tataitwe;
Abandi tutegyereize
Kwetwa kutaahayo.

Yes’, ogum’ otwebembere,
Bwanyim’ otwambutsye;
Obunaku ku burihika,
Tutaah’ omu iguru.

songs.title: Ekitabo kya Ruhanga
verses:
Ekitabo kya Ruhanga
Ninkikunda munonga,
Kingambir’ amazima,
Ku ndi omunyabibi.

Kinyegyesa rukundo
Y’Omucunguzi wangye;
Ku ndug’ omu muhanda
Gwa Yesu, kimpabura.

Ku mba ngwir’ omu kabi,
Kintambir’ amaganya;
Kimmanyisa gye ku ndi 
Omuhinguzi omu nsi.

Kandi ekyo kitabo
Kimmanyisa ngu omuntu
Aryasingura rufu
Ahabw’okwesiga Yesu.

Kingambira ngu omuntu
Orikwanga kweteisa,
Akafeer’ omu bibi,
Aryahwerekyerera.

Kwonk’ abarikweteisa
Bakaikiriza Yesu,
Baryaheebw’ amagara
Ag’ebiro n’ebiro.

Kand’ eki nkikundira
N’okub’ ekya Ruhanga,
Eky’obuguzi bwingi
Okukir’ ebindi byona.

songs.title: Ekigambo kyawe
verses:
Ekigambo kyawe,
Ai Mukama Ruhanga,
Nikyo kituhabura
Omuhanda gwawe.

Abazigu baitu
Ku batwirira haihi,
Nikyo kitusinguza
Orugamba rwona.

Ku habaho eihunga
Ery’akagwe n’enaku,
Nikyo kituhwezesa
Omuhanda gwaitu.

Kandi n’omurikyo
Abantu b’obutoosha
Nimwo bashuuruurirwa
Ebirungi byawe.

Ekigambo kyawe
Kihwer’ abahuriire;
N’abari haihi kufa
Kibahuumuriza.

Ai Mukama waitu,
Tuh’ okukishoma gye,
Tukukundire kimwe,
Tukugume haihi.

songs.title: Gum’ ohamy’ Ekitab’ ekirikwera
verses:
Gum’ ohamy’ Ekitab’ ekirikwera,
N’obu waakunyagw’ ebindi byona;
Ebyamwo bib’ eby’obuguzi bwingi,
Tibirisiisikara na kakye.

Hariho abant’ abagwejegyereire
Omu turo tw’ebibi byabo;
Ebigambo by’omuri ekyo Kitabo
Nibyo bibaasa kubasisiimura.

Hariho n’abandi abaasiisikaire,
Ab’ ekibi kyaburiize kimwe;
Ekyo Kitabo nikyo kibahaisa
Amagara masy’ agatahwaho.

Niyo tabaaz’ emurikir’ obutoosha
Ababuriirw’ omuhanda boona;
Nikyo kihabur’ abarikunyeeta
N’aband’ abataine migwere.

Kyehimbagirizibw’ abagurusi
Hamwe n’abakaikuru baitu;
Omu bitabo byona eby’omu nsi
Nikyo kyonka tweta rugambwa.
songs.chorus:
Gum’ okihamye! Gum’ okihamye!
Gum’ okihamye! Kikwebembere.

songs.title: Ensi ka zeeshongore
verses:
Ensi ka zeeshongore
Okumanyisa
Obukama bwa Yesu
N’oburungi bwe;
Abantu boona bahe
Eiziina ry’ ekitiinisa.

Ensi ka zeeshongore
Oburugwa-izooba
Ei eizooba rituura
Nirituruka;
Chaina eyeshongore,
Na Buhindi ehurire.

Ensi ka zeesiime
N’okweshongora,
Kandi n’Abaisramu
Bamuhimbise;
Eby’okurangaanwa kwe
Bibugy’ Afrika yoona.

Embaju zoon’ ez’ensi
Zimwinamire;
Abatwir’ omu birwa
N’omu bibira,
Muhimbis’ eiziina rye
Nyomushana na nyekiro

Ensi zeeshongorere
Yesu Mukama;
Hoona-hoona habugye
Okuragaanwa kwe.
Ka tumuramye wenka
Mukama w’obusingye.

songs.title: Yes’ akagir’ entumwa ze
verses:
Yes’ akagir’ entumwa ze
Ati, Mwirooko mugyende,
Muz’ omu mahanga goona,
Mugamb’ eby’Engiri yangye,
Bamany’ eby’Okwija kwangye,
Nk’oku naafeereir’ abantu,
Nkabacungurira kimwe,
Bakarug’ omu buhuuku.

Muhurir’ amakondere
Nigagamb’ omu nsi zoona,
Nigamanyis’ amakuru
G’okushemererwa kwingi;
Ebi biro by’omwirima
Ogutwehinguririize
Biryamarwah’ Okwija kwe
Obwire ku burisheesha.

Itw’ ab’omu Kanisa ye
Erikurwan’ orugamba,
Twena hamwe n’abaafiire,
Abaayogiz’ ebijwaro,
Tweshongor’ ebyeshongoro,
Tukwatanisiize hamwe,
Nitusiim’ Omusinguzi
Owaasingwire Sitaane.

Mureeb’ Emanueli naija
Ajwair’ ebirunga bingi,
Mukama w’abarikwera
Na baamaraika boona.
Iwe Magara g’abantu,
Mushana kandi Rukundo,
Ekitebe kya Ruhanga
N’ekyawe wenk’ obutoosha.

songs.title: Imw’ abairu ba Ruhanga waitu
verses:
Imw’ abairu ba Ruhanga waitu,
Mubuzye hoona ekitiinisa kye,
Mumanyise boon’ Eiziina rya Yesu,
Kandi ku ari Omukama w’ensi zoona.

Ruhanga niwe Rukira-boona,
Atuura haihi n’abantu be boona;
Ain’ obushoboorozi bw’okujuna
Boon’ abatakir’ Eiziina rya Yesu.

Ka tusingize Ruhanga waitu,
Itw’ ab’omu nsi n’abari omu iguru,
Kandi tuhimbise Mukama Yesu
Omwana gw’entaam’ owaatufeereire.

Nimwije mwena, tumwehongyere,
Tumusiimire rukundo ye nyingi;
Kandi tumuh’ ekitiinisa kingi,
Tataitwe n’Omwana kandi n’Omwoyo.

songs.title: Sher’r’ ababuzire
verses:
Sher’r’ ababuzire, n’abarikufa
Obasaasibwe, obashahure
Omu kufa n’omu bibi byabo,
Obagambire ku Yes’ akiza.

Omu mutima gw’omusiisi weena
Habamu ekimukundisa Yesu;
Ku okukigambaho, oine rukundo,
Akaahurir’ eki orikugamba.

Sher’r’ ababuzire; Mukama waitu
Naija kukuheerez’ amaani ge;
Naiwe otaaruure ebirare byona,
Biij’ omu muhand’ ogufunzire.
songs.chorus:
Sher’r’ ababuzire, saasibw’ abasiisi;
Yes’ ow’embabazi naabakunda.

songs.title: Twar’ omushan’ omuri Afrika
verses:
Twar’ omushan’ omuri Afrika,
Irook’ omaremu omwirima,
Gambir’ abantu boon’ abaamwo
Yesu ku ar’ Omujuni; oti, naany’ akanjuna.
N’Omukama W’abakama
Ni Ruhanga otambir’ abain’ ebibi,
Itw’ abain’ ebibi.

Noomanya ng’ omuri Afrika
Harimu omwirima ndindindi,
Kandi Yesu niiw’ atumire
Ngu ogyend’ obabuurire Omwirima guhwemu.
Otatiina Otatiina;
Twar’ engiri Obuurir’ abantu baamwo, 
boona abarimu.

Noomany’ Omwana wa Ruhanga
Akab’ ari omu iguru na Ishe;
Ku yaareebir’ abant’ omu nsi
Bari ab’okuhwaho yaija kubacungura;
Nikwo kufa Nikwo kufa
Ahabwaitu akabambw’ aha Musharaba,
Ngu atwih’ omu mwirima.

Yesu, ninkushaba ngu ompwere,
Omp’ Omwoyo waaw’ Orikwera,
Amp’ amaani ge n’obumanzi,
Mbone kukuheereza	nk’oku ndikubaasa,
Obukama	bwa Ruhanga
Bweyongere	bubugy’ omu ns’ egi yoona,
omu ns’ egi yoona.

songs.title: Ensi yoon’ ekab’
songs.chorus:
Hat’ ij’ ahari ogwo Mushana,
Nimmanya ngu gukanyakira;
Nkaba ndi empumi, yampumuura.
Yesu n’Omushana gw’ensi.

songs.title: Abanyabibi boona
verses:
Abanyabibi boona
Abarariire hare,
Yesu abaikiriza
Ahabw’embabazi ze.

Rahuk’ akuhuumuze,
Yesigy’ Ekigambo kye;
Okiza boon’ ebibi,
Mukama tamubinga.

Nyow’ omu maisho gaawe
Ndi omusiisi buzima,
Kwonka ku nyij’ ah’ori,
Embabazi zimpuumuza.

Ka nkusingize, Yesu,
Ahabw’okuunyakiira,
Nyow’ owaakugomeire.
Okanyozyaho ebibi.

Abafukire mwena,
N’abeehweir’ amatsiko,
Nimurahukye juba,
Yes’ akiin’ embabazi.
songs.chorus:
Mugume nimu ... kyeshongora,
Yesu ku ayakiir’... abanyabibi;
Mukishobororere ... abantu boona,
Ku ayakiir’ abasiisi.

songs.title: Imw’ abarikutaataana
verses:
Imw’ abarikutaataana
Mbwenu nimutiina ki?
Yesu, ka niwe Muriisa
Orikwet’ entaama ze.

Nk’oku omuriis’ asherur’ entaama ze zibuzire,
Nikwo Yesu abasher’ra,
Imwe mwen’ entaama ze.

Murekye kugir’ obwoba;
Eshagama ya Yesu,
Eyaaseesirw’ ahabwaitu,
Niy’ etwozyaho ebibi.

Mutatiina, ngu ahakuba
Muri enkozi z’ebibi;
Omujuni waitu Yesu
Tagira kimurema.

Imwe mwen’ abarikwenda
Amagar’ agatahwaho
Muteehongyer’ ondi weena,
Kureka Yesu wenka.

Mwije, mwij’ ahari Yesu,
Murekye kweziringa;
We naatweta n’okukunda
Okutakareebwaga.

Nimwija kutunga hati
Ebi yaaraganiise;
Kandi mushemerererwe
Ebi araabahe byona.

songs.title: Mukama  nangir’ ati
verses:
Mukama nangir’ ati,
Oin’ amaani makye;
Hat’ ij’ onyehongyere
Toribaasa kukyena.

Niwe wenk’ oin’ amaani
Kworobeza kimwe
Omutima gw’eibaare,
N’okukiz’ omubembe.

Tiinyine kintu kyona
Ky’okweraatiraho;
Eshagama ye yonka
Niy’ empais’ oburungi.

Omu maisho g’ekitebe kye
Ndyayemererayo,
Nyin’ eminyago yangye,
Ngit’ aha bigyere bye.
songs.chorus:
Yes’ akaihura
Amabanja gangye,
Yansaasirira kimwe,
Naayera tititi.

songs.title: Tuhuriir’ amakuru marungi
verses:
Tuhuriir’ amakuru marungi munonga,
Agarikumanyisa ku Yesu ajuna;
Ogabuzy’ omu bantu
Ab’omu byaro byona,
Kandi n’ab’omu ndembo,
Ku Yesu ajuna.

Manyis’ abanyabibi ku Yesu ajuna,
Kandi n’abashobeirwe, n’ab’ obamanyise,
Akasheesh’ eshagama
Ir’ obu yaatufeera,
Ngu abone kubajuna
Batungy’ amagara.

Gum’ okyeshongorere omu ns’ egi eruhire,
N’obu harimu orwari n’empaka z’abantu.
Abari omu mwirima
N’abeehweir’ amatsiko,
Nabo bakihurire,
Ku Yesu ajuna.

N’aha izooba ry’enaku ry’okufeerw’ ab’owaitu,
Turekye kushoberwa nk’abataine matsiko;
Mbwen’ amahanga goona
Geesiime nigeeshongora
Ahabw’ago makuru,
Ku Yesu ajuna.

songs.title: Buri muntu ween’
verses:
Buri muntu ween’ oraahurire
Ebigambo by’Omucunguzi waitu,
Amanyise ween’ oraikirize,
Yesu ku ari Omujuni.

Orikwenda ween’ atakyerererwa;
Yesu niwe irembo ry’okurabamu,
Kandi n’omuhanda ogw’amazima,
Ogu yaatucwereire.

Eki yaaraganiis’ itw’ abantu be,
N’okutuh’ amaizi ag’amagara,
Agu aheera bush’ ahabw’ okukunda kwe
Ween’ orikwikiriza.
songs.chorus:
Orikwenda weena, Orikwenda weena;
Imw’ ab’omu nsi zoona, muhurire,
Oku Yes’ ayozya n’eshagama ye
Ween’ orikumwesiga.

songs.title: Entaama kyenda na mwenda
verses:
Entaama kyenda na mwenda
Zikaba ziri gye,
Kwonka ngyenzi yaazo emwe
Yaarug’ aha Muriisa,
Aha Muriis’ omurungi,
Yaahabir’ omu nshozi za  hare,
Bwanyima yaaburir’ omu ihamba.

Mukam’, ezo ntaama zaawe
Tizirikukumara?
Kwonka yaagarukamu, ati,
Tizirikummara gye.
Nangwa n’obu haakuba hata,
Niinyija kusherur’ egyo ntaama
Okuhitsy’ ahu ndaagigwereho.

Egyo ntaama teramanyire
Bubi bw’omuhand’ ogwo
Ah’ Omuriisa yaarabire
Atakagiboine
Omu byambu ebiijwire,
N’omu mahwa mab’ agakwataine,
Kandi n’omu mwirima ndindindi.

Omuri okwo kusherura
Akasheesh’ eshagama,
Emikono n’ebigyere bye
Byacumitw’ amahwa.
Kwonka byona bikamweba,
Ku yaareebir’ ati egyo ntaama ye,
Kandi yaagiih’ omuri ako kabi.

Omuriis’ akashemererwa,
Yaayeta banywani be,
Ati, Mwije tushemererwe,
Entaam’ eri ngiboine,
Nikwo Ruhang’ ashemererwa,
Omusiisi weena ku ahinduka,
Omwan’ ozaahire ku azaahuuka.

songs.title: Ongambir’ ebya Yesu
verses:
Ongambir’ ebya Yesu
Eby’okukunda kwe,
Ku yaatsigireh’ obukama bwe
Ahabwaitu abasiisi;
Gamb’ ebigambo birungi
Ebi ndikwetegyereza;
Ahakuba ndi nk’omwana muto
Otaine bwengye bwingi.

Ongambir’ obutoosha
Oku yancungwire,
Akanjun’ ebibi byangye byona
Nyow’ owaamusiisiire;
Kand’ ogum’ obingambire,
Ahakuba ndahuka kwebwa;
Ebi bangambir’ omu kasheeshe
Omu ihangwe biinyeba.

Ku ndaagir’ obusaasi,
Bwammaramu amaani,
Ongambir’ ebigambo bya Yesu;
Nibyo bimpuumuza gye.
Kandi ku ndaabeihwabeihwe
Eby’ekitiinisa ky’ensi,
Naarug’ ahari Mukama waitu,
Garuk’ obingambire.

Ku ndiba naahikire
Aha ncwamba za rufu,
Naakondahirirw’ eby’omu ns’ egi,
Naashobeirwe munonga,
Kand’ obwo nabw’ ongambire
Ebyo bigambo birungi,
Ebirikumpuumuz’ omutima,
Ku Yes’ ari Omujuni.
songs.chorus:
Ongambir’ ebyo ebyaira
Eby’okushemererwa,
Ongambir’ ebya Yesu
N’eby’okukunda kwe.

songs.title: Reeba, ndi aha rwigi rwawe
verses:
Reeba, ndi aha rwigi rwawe
Niinyiguza; onyigurire.
Beit’ ebibi tibikurutsya?
Nyigurira! Nyigurira!

Reeba, nkabambw’ ahabwawe;
Toijuka ku naakufeereire?
Mbwenu k’ otakiine busingye!
Nyigurira! Nyigurira!

Nkakwihurir’ omuhendo
Gu otakubaasiz’ ahabwawe,
Okumar’ eibanja ry’ekibi;
Mwana wangye, nyigurira!

Mbwenu nkuhair’ ebiconco
Eby’okukunda n’obusingye,
N’amagar’ agatarihwaho;
Mwana wangye, onyesigye.
songs.chorus:
Orikukwiguza ni Yesu;
Hurira, naakwetongyeza,
Ati, “Ontaasye, nkuruhuure”.
Hati garukamu ot’ “Ija”.

songs.title: Yesu akutegyereize
verses:
Yesu akutegyereize
Okukujuna;
Obutoosha We naakwet’ ati,
Rugayo!

Otagomer’ okweta kwe;
Akakufeera.
Many’ akakubambirwa ngu 
akucungure.

Embabazi z’Omujuni
Noozangira ki?
Tomwesig’, akakujuna,
Okeesiima?

K’ omazir’ emyaka mingi
Ori omu bibi,
Nookoresibwa Sitaane
Ebi akunda.

Toikiriz’ akakujuna,
Haz’ okeesiima,
Okeehayo n’okukund’, akakutunga?

Obutoosha W’ akworeka
Ebi oraakore;
Kandi hati naayongyera,
Reka kwanga.

Mukama, tinkyeziringa,
Naakuhikire;
Ompindur’ omwana waawe,
Naagomooka.

songs.title: Iw’ ori omu rwari rw’ensi
verses:
Iw’ ori omu rwari rw’ensi
N’omu mirabanamu,
Hurira, Yesu naakweta,
At’, Ij’, onkuratire.

Abajubi bakahur’ra
Eiraka rye naabeeta,
Baatsigah’ ebyabo byona,
Baija, baamwehongyera.

Yes’ atweta ngu turekye
Kweteng’ eby’omu ns’ egi
Aryatumar’ obukyene,
Ku turiguma nawe.

N’obu turaabe turi gye,
Nari turi omu naku,
Hoona Yesu naakitweta,
Ngu tumukuratire.

Mbwenu, Mukam’, otuhwer’
Ahabw’embabazi zaawe,
Tukworober’ obutoosha,
Kandi tukuheereze.

songs.title: Mpuriire Yesu nangira
verses:
Mpuriire Yesu nangira
At’, Ij’ ahariinye,
Nkutuur’ ebikuremire,
Mbikwekorerere.
Naij’ ah’ari, ndi nk’oku ndi,
Nshobeirwe, nduhire,
Yambeer’ oburuhuukiro
N’okushemererwa.

Mpuriire Yesu nangira
At’, Iw’ oin’ eiriho,
Rugayo, nkuheere bush’
Amaizi g’amagara.
Ntyo naij’ ah’ari, naanywa
N’okushemererwa,
Omutima gwahw’ eiriho,
Naagaruka busya.

Mpuriire Yesu nangira
Ati, Ndi Omushana
Ogujwer’ abantu boona;
Ndeeba, haz’ ohweze.
Naanye ku naamureebire,
Yaab’ eizooba ryangye
Ry’okuunyakiz’ omushana
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.

songs.title: Ira ku naabaire ngwejegyeire
verses:
Ira ku naabaire ngwejegyeire
Ndi omu turo tw’ebibi bingi,
Naahurir’ eiraka ry’Omujuni,
Nangir’ ati, Nyiguriraho!

Yesu yaanyet’ aha bugyenyi bwe,
Naabutaaha nyin’ okwesiima,
Naashemererwa nk’abarikwera
Abambandiiz’ omu iguru.

Kand’ omu kurwana na Sitaane
Niwe ngabo n’eicumu byangye,
Niwe maani gangy’ agatahwaho
Agabaas’ abazigu boona.

Hati nindiira omu maisho ge,
Kandi niinywer’ aha kyambu kye;
Bwanyima ku ndihik’ omu iguru,
Nibwo ndiigutira kimwe.
songs.chorus:
Hat’ iguraho orwigi,
Yes’ ataahe omuriiwe,
Omutima gwawe gushemererwe,
Yesu ku araagutaahemu.

songs.title: Ij’ ohur’r’ eiraka
verses:
Ij’ ohur’r’ eiraka
Ery’embabazi,
Niryo ry’Omujuni,
Naakugir’ ati,

Iwe Omusiisi
Ij’ akwiheho
Ebibi byawe byona
N’eshagama ye.

Ku oraabe nooronda
Obuhungiro,
Ij’ ahari Yesu,
Akuhuumuze.

Mukama waaw’ ogwo
Naakugir’ ati,
Ngambir’ obujune
Bwawe bwona.
songs.chorus:
Onyehongyere,
Nkakubambirwa,
Niinye ndikukweta,
Ij’ ahariinye.

songs.title: Mwena nimwij' ahari Yesu
verses:
Mwena nimwij’ ahari Yesu,
Muteeziringa, murahukye;
Hati ayemereir’ omuriitwe,
Naayet’ ati; Mwije!

Ween’ orikwenda kucungurwa,
Arekye kwenda kweshemeza,
Ahakuba Yes’ akeehayo,
Yaabambw’ ahabwaitu.

Mbwenu, ekyaitu n’okwesiga
Eshagama y’ ei yaaseesire,
Kandi n’okworober’ eiraka rye
Eririkutweta.
songs.chorus:
Eshi, ku turireeba Yesu,
Turyagir’ amashemererwa,
Tutaahe naw’ omu bukama bwe
Obutarihwaho.

songs.title: Imw’ abaruhire, nimwije
verses:
Imw’ abaruhire, nimwije,
Imwe mwen’ abashobeirwe,
Mukama naabatangirira
Abainiire rukundo;
Nimwije mwena, mwije mwena,
Muhuumure, mutatiina.

Mureeb’ Omwana wa Ruhanga
Ori omu Gesesemaani,
Kandi ari aha Musharaba
Naagamba n’eiraka rihango
Naagir’ ati, Kyahwera kimwe!
Eki naiziriire kyahwa.

Mbwenu mwije, muteeziringa,
Murekye kwenda kweshemeza.
Timurigira bu mwizire,
Ku muraayende kweshemeza.
Taraizire kweta barungi,
Kurek’ ababi kweteisa.

Itw’ abaherize kujunwa
Twena turyamutangirira,
Ab’omu iguru n’ab’omu nsi
Twena tumweshongorere,
Tuti! Aleluy’! Aleluya!
Niiwe Mujuni w’abantu.

songs.title: Imwe mwen’ abaruhire
verses:
Imwe mwen’ abaruhire, abaremereirwe,
Mwij’ ahari Yesu Kristo, haz’ abahuumuze.

Akahay’ amagara ge, yaabambw’ aha muti,
Kandi yaasheesh’ eshagama, eyozya tititi.

Niw’ ab’ Omuhanda gwaitu, kandi n’Amazima;
Murahukye kumwesiga, muheebw’ omugisha.

Nimwije tukwatanise orugyendo rwaitu,
Tutaahe hamw’ omu iguru, omu kushemererwa.
songs.chorus:
Mwesigye Yesu Omujuni
Abahuumuze;
Mumwikirize, abajune
Ebibi byanyu.

songs.title: Musiisi ’we, tiwaaruha?
verses:
Musiisi ’we, tiwaaruha? Shanga Kristo!
Hurira naakweta, ati, Ij’ oruhuukye.

Nyowe nkaamumanyira hi, ku nkumureeba?
Many’ ain’ enkojo z’emisomaari omu ngaro.

Yes’ ogw’ ajwair’ ekirunga eky’obugabe?
Eego, akijwaire; kwonka shi ajwair’ eky’amahwa.

Ku ndaamukuratire shi, ningasirwa ki?
Noija kugum’ otungy’ obusaasi n’enaku.

Ku ndaagume haihi nawe, mbwenu nampa ki?
Noija kusingur’ obwo busaasi n’okufa.

Ku nkumweshengyereza nti, Yesu, nyakiira,
Noogira ngu akaabaasa kunyanga? Rubuuza!

Ku ndaagume nimmukunda, namp’ omugisha?
Abarikwera boona nibahamya ngu – Eego.

songs.title: Yesu akutegyereize
verses:
Yesu akutegyereize,
Iwe musiisi ’we;
Yeteis’ ebibi byawe,
Abikusaasire.

Yesu akutegyereize,
Ij’ omwikirize,
Oyakiir’ amagara
Agatarihwaho.

Yesu akutegyereize,
Otakyerererwa!
Ategir’ emikono
Kukubumbatira.

Yesu akutegyereize;
Mbwenu nootiina ki?
Ka n’Omujuni waawe
Owaakufeereire.
songs.chorus:
Rahuk’ oije! Rahuk’ oije!
Akutegyereize;
Yatur’ ebibi byawe,
Haz’ oheebw’ omugisha,
Agukuheere busha,
Otang’, ogwakiire.

songs.title: Nkararira har’ omu bibi
verses:
Yes’ owansheesheir’ eshagama
Ha Musharaba,
Ikiriza kuginyogyesa;
Mbwenu naija.

Ai Mukama, naakwetuurira,
Hat’ ontambire,
Kand’ ongarurir’ amatsiko;
Mbwenu naija.

songs.title: Naija hati, Yesu,
verses:
Naija hati, Yesu, nk’oku ndi,
Ntaine ky’okwetonganira,
Kurek’ ahabw’embabazi zaawe,
Mucunguzi, naija.

Tindikubaasa kweyihaho
Kabara na kamwe k’ekibi,
Kureka niinyesig’ eshagama,
Ku enyogyeza kimwe.

N’obu ndaabe ninfa kubi,
Nkabangaanisa, nkatiina
Ahabw’okugir’ engamba nyingi,
Kwonka Yesu, naija.

Mukama, naija nk’oku ndi,
Ndi empumi, nyeshobeire;
Naakwetuurir’, ontambire,
Mucunguzi, naija.

Okaragaanisa kuunyakiira,
Kunsaasira n’okuntunga;
Ahabw’okwesig’ ebi ogamba,
Mucunguzi, naija.

songs.title: Tiinyine kigambo kyon’ ekirungi
verses:
Tiinyine kigambo kyon’ ekirungi
Eky’okwetonganir’ ah’ori,
Kurek’ okwesig’ eshagama yaawe;
Hati naija, naija, Mukama.

Mbwenu tinkyesiibyayo, ngu nkaatuubya
Ha by’okushiisha byangye byona,
Kureka niinyesig’ egyo shagama;
Hati naija, naija, Mukama.

N’obu ndaabe nimbungabunga hati,
Ahabw’obwoba bw’omu mutima,
Orugamba ruunyehinguririize;
Yesu, hati naija nk’oku ndi.

Nyowe nk’oku ndi empumi n’omunaku,
Ninshang’ omuriiw’ okuhweza,
Obutungi bwona n’okutambirwa;
Hati naija, naija, Mukama.

songs.title: Mpuriir’ eiraka ryawe
verses:
Mpuriir’ eiraka ryawe
Ry’ embabazi, Yesu,
Noonyeta kushemezibwa
Eshagama yaawe.

Mukama, naayereeba,
Nyin’ ebibi bingi;
Nikyo naizir’ ahariiwe,
Ngu obinjune byona.

Mukama, ninkushaba
Omutima musya,
Ogwijwir’ okwikiriza
N’obusingye bwingi.

Ai Mukam’, onyongyere
Emigisha yaawe,
Naanye mbone kwezirika
Kukuheereza gye.
songs.chorus:
Naija, Mukama,
Naij’ ahariiwe;
Onyozye, onshemeze
N’eshagama yaawe.

songs.title: Mukama, Ninkutakira
verses:
Mukama, ninkutakira,
Orahukye oij’ onjune;
N’obu ndi otashemereire,
Nyakiira, nk’oku ndi.

Ndi mubi orengyesereize,
Kandi nommanyira kimwe;
Ompindur’ omuntu musya,
Mbe nk’oku orikwenda.

Okweshemeza kundemire,
Amaani gangye ni makye;
Kwonk’ ahabw’Eiziina ryawe,
Onjune, nk’oku ndi.

Reeba, ninkweshengyereza,
Ongire, nk’oku orikwenda;
Byon’ ebi orankorere,
Obihikiirize.
songs.chorus:
Nyakiira, Mukama,
Nyakiira, Mukama;
N’obu ndi otashemereire,
Nyakiira, nk’oku ndi.

songs.title: Ebibi byangye, Yesu
verses: Ebibi byangye, Yesu Akabyekorera. Omwana wa Ruhanga Otagira kibi Akarug’ omu iguru Akaija, yaarug’ omu iguru Ahabw’okukunda kwe Okuunyozyaho ebibi Okuunyogyeza kimw’ ebibi Omu shagama ye.

Byon’ ebirikundusya Mbimwegyekyereire, Kandi n’endwara zangye Niw’ azintambira. Tihain’ ondiijo weena Tihain’ ondiij’ otari Yesu, Owakubyemera; Kand’ akashaasha naitwe Akasaasira hamwe naitwe Omu naku zaitu.

Ampuumuz’ omutima Gwaba gushobeirwe; Kandi ku nteer’ entsibo, Ankwat’ omukono. Nyowe nkund’ Eiziina rye Ninkund’ Eiziina rye rirungi, Eiziina rya Yesu; Niwe Mukama wangye, Niwe Mukam’ otarihwaho. Kristo Emanueli.

Niinyenda kushushana Na Yes’ omu micwe; Niwe murungi wenka, Kandi omucureezi. Niinyenda ngume nawe Niinyenda kuguma na Yesu omu bukama bwe, Mmuhimbis’ obutoosha Mmuhimbise niinyeshongora N’abarikwera be.

songs.title: Niinyesiim’ ahabw’ okumanya
verses:
Niinyesiim’ ahabw’ okumanya
Yesu ku ari Omujuni wangye;
Niwe yancungwiz’ eshagama,
Kand’ akanzaaz’ obwa kabiri.

Tinkyetegyeka, ndi owa Yesu,
Nikyo kirikuunyesiimisa;
Nkamuh’ ebyabaire bindusya,
Yaabinjuna, yamp’ obusingye,

Hati nintegyekw’ Omujuni,
Mpiiriirw’ okub’ owe buzima;
Ntegyereiz’ endiijo migisha,
Ei aramp’ ahabw’okunkunda.
songs.chorus:
Ebibi byange akabinyoreka.
Naayeteisa, nawe yanjuna;
Ka mmuhimbise, nyeshongore,
Kandi mmusiim’ ebiro byona.

songs.title: Nkwat' omukono, Yesu Mujuni wangye
verses:
Nkwat' omukono, Yesu Mujuni wangye,
Tiinyine maani g’okweshembutsya;
Ku oraab’ onkwaitse, tindikwija kugwa,
Tihaine kyon’ ekirintiinisa.

Nkwat’ omukono, ogum’ onyehitsye,
Iwe matsiko gangy’ agatahwa;
Onkwate, ntakaarug’ omu muhanda,
Nkakuburaho, nkagw’ omu kabi.

Ku ndihik’ aha mugyera gw’okufa,
Ogu waayambukir’ ahabwangye,
Onkwat’ omukono, mbone kugwambuka
Ntaah’ omu iguru nyin’ obusingye.

songs.title: Yesu, Niinyehayo
verses:
Yesu, niinyehayo
Ahariiwe;
Ninkweshengyereza
Onyakiire.
Nyin’ ebibi bingi,
Kwonka ninkwesiga
Kwonka ninkwesiga,
okanfeera

Kandi niinyatura
Eby’okushiisha;
Onkwatse, nyemere
Ebibi byangye,
Mbone kusaasirwa,
Omutima gwangye,
Omutima gwangye
Guhuumure.

Mujuni, nsaasira;
Ninkwesiga,
Nkutsimbir’ amaju
Omumaisho.
Nyozya n’eshagama
Ei waaseesire,
Iw’ Omwana gw’entaama
Wa Ruhanga.

Niiw’ orimpigika
Niinyesiima
Ahabw’okuteerana
Hamwe naiwe.
Sitaane ku ariija,
Niiw’ orimpigika,
Niiw’ orimpigika,
Ndekye kugwa.

songs.title: Ebibi byangye byona
verses:
Ebibi byangye byona n’obusaasi
Nkabyegyekyerera Yesu wenka;
Ku naamwetegyereiz’ abambirwe,
Naamanya ku yaafiir’ ahabwangye,
Yantuur’ ogwo mutwaro gw’ebibi,
Naakira;
Yantuur’ ogwo mutwaro gw’ebibi,
Naaruhuuka.

Iwe mwehwa-matsiko ’we, yemera
Kumureeter’ ebyaw’, otatiina.
N’obu ari Omuhangi w’ensi zoona,
Ku oraamworobere, naakujuna.
Many’ ogir’ ekibanj’ omu iguru,
Kikibayo;
Many’ ogir’ ekibanj’ omu iguru,
Taahayo.

songs.title: Ku oraitw’ emirabanamu
verses:
Ku oraitw’ emirabanamu y’egi nsi,
Kandi waayehwera kimw’ amatsiko,
Ijuk’ emigisha yoon’ ei otunga,
Ku eri mingi kand’ ey’okutangaaza.

Ku oraab’ oine bingi’ ebikushobeire,
Waaremwa kubyegyekyerera Yesu,
Ijuk’ emigisha yoon’ ei otunga,
Omutima gukugaruky’ omunda.

Ku oraayetengy’ ebibanja by’abandi.
Amatungo kandi n’empiiha byabo,
Ijuk’ ebi Yesu akubiikiire,
Ebi oritunga waahik’ omu iguru.

N’obu oraarwane n’abazigu baingi,
Oteehw’ amatsiko; Yesu akwine.
Aryaguma naakurind’ obutoosha,
Okuhitsy’ obu orihik’ omu iguru.

songs.title: Omubi Sitaane ku araakutegye
verses:
Omubi Sitaane ku araakutegye,
Iwe Mukristaayo ’w’, otamworobera;
Gum’ orwane mashaija, nooreba Yesu,
Naija kukuhwera, abikurabyemu.

Yetantar’ emikago y’abantu babi,
Ogum’ oyerind’ ebigaaniiro bibi,
Obyangire kimwe, nooreeba Yesu,
Naija kukuhwera, abikurabyemu.

B’ omunyambabazi, ohwer’ abandi,
Yerind’ okubeiha, otarihemuka;
Gum’ ori ow’amazima, nooreeba Yesu,
Naija kukuhwera, abikurabyemu.

Sitaane n’obu araabe naakurwanisa,
Ahabw’okwesiga Yesu oryamusingura;
Gum’ orwane mashaija, nooreeba Yesu,
Naija kukuhwera, abikurabyemu.
songs.chorus:
Shaba Yes’, aij’ akuhwere
Akugumy’, akurinde;
Niwe munywani waawe,
Naija kukusinguza.

songs.title: Yesu, ninkwesiga
verses:
Yesu, ninkwesiga,
Mwana wa Ruhanga, Omujuni;
Mbwenu ninkushaba,
Onyiheho ebibi,
Hati, Yesu, mb’ owaaw’ onyakiire.

Nyijuz’ embabazi,
Omp’ amaani gaawe, ompimbuure.
Nk’oku wankunzire,
Naanye ka nkukunde,
Rukundo yangy’ erekye
Kuhwaho.

Ku ndaabe nindaba
Omu mwirima mwingi, nyebembera;
Ontambir’ enaku,
Ondembesereze,
Kand’ otandeka nkakurugaho.

Kandi ku ndihika
Aha ncwamba za rufu, ompuumuze,
Ommaremu obwoba,
Ndekye kushoberwa,
Mpiky’ owaawe ndi omunt’ ocungwirwe.

songs.title: Ninkwesig’, Iw’ Omujuni wangye
verses:
Ninkwesig’, Iw’ Omujuni wangye,
Iwe wenka, Yesu,
Ku ojunira kimw’ omusiisi weena
Okwesiga.

Niinyesig’ okusaasira kwawe,
Nkukwaits’ amaguru,
Ku oba niiwe wangirir’ embabazi,
Okankiza.

Niinyesiga n’eshagama yaawe
Y’obuguzi bwingi,
Ei waasheesheir’ aha Musharaba
Okunyozya.

Ninkwesig’, Iwe Mukama wangye,
Ku origuma naanye,
Okanyebember’ obutoosh’ omu
Muhanda gwawe.

Ninkwesiga ku niiw’ omp’ amaani
Omu bweremwa bwangye,
Kand’ oryaguma nonsinguza byona
Ebiriija.

Ka ngume ninkwesig’ obutoosha
Omuri ebyo byona;
Otarindeka nkakuhemukaho,
Gum’ ondinde.

songs.title: Mukama nangir’ ati
verses:
Mukama nangir’ ati,
"Nyowe ndi hamwe naiwe,
Orekye kugir’ obwoba
Omu rugyendo rwawe."
Omu mwirima ndindindi
We nandaganis’ ati,
"Ndyaguma ndi hamwe naiwe,
Tindikutsiga wenka."

Ebintu byon’ eby’ensi
Birahuka kuhwaho,
Ni nk’ebirabyo by’omu nsi
Oku bihunduuka;
Kwonka Yesu tikw’ ari,
We tarihunduuka,
Atuura nandaganis’ ati
“Tindikutsiga wenka.”

Ku ndihikwaho akabi
N’ebihikiirizi,
Mukama wangye Yesu
Aryagum’ andi haihi
Nangambira mpora
Ati, “Gum’ otatiina;
Ndyaguma ndi hamwe naiwe,
Tindikutsiga wenka.
songs.chorus:
Nyowe tindigira
Bu ntsigaire nyenka,
Niwe yandaganiis’ ati,
Tindikutsiga wenka.

songs.title: Ori omu mikono ya Yesu
verses:
Ori omu mikono ya Yesu
Tagira ki atiina,
Kandi omuhuumuriramu
Amarwa rukundo ye.
Nimpurir’ amaraka
G’abaatubandiizeyo,
Nibamweshongorera,
Nibahimbisa bati,

Ku mba mbumbatiirwe Yesu,
Tiinyehwa matsiko,
Tiinyemereza mutima,
Ahabw’okub’ andinda.
Nimmanya hakiriyo
Ebindi by’okundenga,
Kandi n’eby’okunsaasa,
Nkiri omuri egi nsi;

Yes’, Obuhungiro bwangye
Kand’ Owanfeereire,
Niw’ ab’ Orukiri rwangye,
Oru nyemereraho.
Mbwenu nintegyereza
Mukama wangye Yesu,
Obwire ku burisheesha
Ndyaza naw’ omu iguru;
songs.chorus:
Ori omu mikono ya Yesu
Tagira ki atiina,
Kandi omuhuumuriramu
Amarwa rukunso ye.

songs.title: Mukama, ku waakwekorera
verses:
Mukama, ku waakwekorera
Amaganya gaitu n’obusaasi,
Tukaashemererwa,
Tumany’ ebyaitu byona, Yesu,
Ku niiwe obitah’ omutima,
Okabishemeza gye.

Kaingi eby’ensi bintiinisa,
Nyemereza munong’ omutima,
Mbur’ okwikiriza.
Ku naakureka kwesig’ ensi,
Nkaba niiwe naayesiga wenka,
Nkaaguma nkwegamiire.

Nkaazibirwa ki kukushaba,
Nkakwegyekyerer’ ebyangye byona
Ebindemereire?
Nkaahuumurizibw’ okumanya
Ku Ogw’ oriisa n’ebiteera-nkumba,
Atabaasa kuunyebwa.

Yesu, titurikukwesiga,
Nk’oku kirikutushemerera;
Mukama, n’tukushaba,
Enyonyi n’ebirabyo byona
Bib’ eby’okutwegyes’ obutoosha
Okwesiga Tataitwe.

songs.title: Mukama, twegyese kushaba
verses:
Mukama, twegyese kushaba gye,
Tukutiin’ omu buryo buhikire;
N’obu turaabe turi abasiisi,
Twikirize, tukuhikye.

Ku tureka tuti kukushaba,
Ebibi bigaruka bituboha;
Otuh’ Omwoyo waaw’ Orikwera,
Agumy’ emitima yaitu.

Ku turaayeteguure kushaba
Omu kushaba kwait’ okw’obutoosha,
Otwakiire, nitukireetana,
Ai Mukam’ ow’embabazi.

songs.title: Mukristaayo, yerinde
verses:
Mukristaayo, yerinde
Orekye kuhuumura,
Akabi kari haihi,
Oshabe.

Abazigu ba Yesu
Hati bakugwereire,
Nibenda kukugwisa;
Oshabe.

Jwar’ eby’okurwanisa,
Gum’ obihagatiire
Nyomushana na nyekiro,
Oshabe.

Hurir’ abaasingwire,
Abaakubandiiz’ ira,
Nibakugira bati,
Oshabe.

Hur’ra Mukama waawe
Yes’ owaakufeereire,
Nawe naakugir’ ati,
Oshabe.

Reka kugwejegyera,
Shoma Baibuli yaawe,
Kand’ ogume nooreeba;
Oshabe.

songs.title: Yesu, nitukutakira
verses:
Yesu, nitukutakira,
Kandi nitukweshengyereza
Hur’r’ okushaba kwaitu.

Mukama wait’ orikwera,
Tushukyeh’ Omwoyo waawe,
Atuhwere, tweteise.

Ahabw’obusaasi bwawe
N’ahabw’amarira gaawe,
Tutakwakwa, Mukama.

Bwanyima ku turihika
Omu maisho ga Tataitwe,
Yesu, turyakusiima.

songs.title: Iwe mutima gwangye
verses:
Iwe mutima gwangye,
Gum’ oshabe Mukama;
Akunda kuhurira
Okushaba kw’abaana be.

Yesu, ninkutakira,
Ongirir’ embabazi,
Onyiheh’ omutwaro
Gw’ebibi ogunduhize.

Kand’ eshagama yaawe
Eyozy’ abanyabibi,
Emmar’ omu mutima
Ebicumuro byona,

Yesu, niinyij’ ah’ori,
Ngu onduhuur’ omutima;
Mbwenu gum’ omuriinye,
Kand’ onyetegyekyere.

Obu nkiri omugyenzi,
Ngume ndi entumwa yaawe,
Naiwe onyebembere
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.

songs.title: Mukama, gamba; mpuriire
verses:
Amarak’ agandi maingi
Gaija gaanyomberera,
Ganzibira kuhurira gye
Eryawe ry’embabazi;
Mukama, ninkwetenga,
Ku ocureez’ orwo rwari.

Ku ndaahur’r’ eiraka ryawe,
Mpwera, ngume ndyorobere,
Kandi nkor’ ebi orikwenda
n’okushemererwa kwingi.
Mbwenu nkutegir’ amatu;
Mukama, nongambira ki?

Mukam’, onyet’ omu iziina,
Mmanye ku niinye waayeta;
Haza ngyende hamwe naiwe,
Ntakiine kubangaanisa,
Okuhitsy’ obu oriija,
Okatutwar’ owaawe.

songs.title: Yesu ij’ ogume
verses:
Yesu, ij’ ogume
Ahagati yaitu,
Otuh’ omugisha
Omu kuramya kwaitu.

Omuri oku kuramya
Shuk’ Omwoyo waawe
Mu mitima yaitu,
Haz’ atwomesereze.

Amaremu obwoba
N’obujune bwona,
Atuh’ obusingye
N’okushemererwa.

Tubone kugyenda
Omu muhanda gwawe,
Nitutegyereza
Okugaruka kwawe.

songs.title: Niinye, niinye, niinye nyenka
verses:
Niinye, niinye, niinye nyenka
Nshemereire kushabirwa
Niinye, niinye,niinye nyenka
Omuntu w’okushabirwa.

Ti tata, ti maawe, kureka niinye
Nshemereire kushabirwa;
Ti tata, ti maawe, kureka niinye
Omuntu w’okushabirwa.

Ti mukuru wangye, kandi ti munyaanyazi
Oshemereire kushabirwa,
Kureka niinye, niinye nyenka
Omuntu w’okushabirwa.

Ti mukama wangye, kandi ti mushoroorwa
Oshemereire kushabirwa;
Kureka niinye, niinye nyenka
Omuntu w’okushabirwa.

songs.title: Mukama, naakuhongyer’
verses:
Mukama, naakuhongyer’ amagara gangye,
Ngume nkor’ obutoosha emirimo yaawe;
Ebiro byangye byon’ ebi ndimar’ omu nsi,
Ndyaguma nkukuratire, kandi nkuhimbise.

Mukama, naakuhongyer’ emikono yangye,
Ogum’ ogikorese nk’oku orikukunda;
Kand’ ebigyere byangye bigume byehuute,
Ngyende ndi entumwa yaaw’ omu mahanga goona.

Kandi n’eiraka ryangye nindikuhongyera,
Ryeshongor’ obutoosh’ eby’okukuhimbisa;
N’eminwa yangy’ egambe eby’Engiri yaawe,
Abasiisi bamanye ku niiwe Mujuni.

Kandi n’eitungo ryangye nindikuhongyera;
Tiinye naaryetungiise, niwe waarimpaire,
Ija hati, otaah’ omu mutima gwangye,
Kib’ ekitebe kyawe, Mukama Ruhanga.

songs.title: Turi abaawe, Mukama
verses:
Turi abaawe, Mukama
Ruhanga otukunda;
Titurikurugaho
Hati n’ebiro byona.

Turi abaawe, Mukama
Ruhang’ ow’amagara;
Guma nootwebembera,
Niiwe muhanda gwaitu.

Turi abaawe, Mukama
Yes’ Omujuni waitu;
Gum’ oturwanirire,
Niwe Murinzi waitu.

Turi abaawe, Mukama,
Ab’omu busyo bwawe;
Titubaasa kuba gye,
Waab’ otaturinzire.

Turi abaawe, Mukama,
Niiw’ otumar’ obworo,
Niiw’ otusaasir’ ebibi,
Ngu otuhitsy’ omu iguru.

songs.title: Yesu, tinkiri kyegyengye
verses:
Amagara gangye goona
Ningakuheera kimwe;
Niiw’ origuma nondinda,
Okampitsy’ omu iguru.

Eitungo ryangye n’empiiha
N’ekitiinisa kyangye,
N’abanyamukago boona,
Noobinkirira byona.

Omubiri gwangye gwona
N’ebigyere n’engaro,
N’amagara gangye goona,
Byona, byona n’ebyawe.

Mujuni, Munyambabazi,
Nyeza, nkukuratire;
Nyin’ enjara, nyin’ eiriho,
Onduhuure, Mujuni.
songs.chorus:
Ndi owaawe, ndi owaawe;
Yesu nyowe ndi owaawe.

songs.title: Niinyenda mb’ Omukristaayo
verses:
Niinyenda mb’ Omukristaayo w’amazima, ow’amazima,
Omukristaayo kashushu, ai Mukama.
Mukama wangye, Mukama wangye,
Niinyenda mb’ Omukristaayo w’amazima.

Kand’ ompindur’ orikwer’ omu mutima, omu mutima,
Nyerere kimw’ omu mutima, Mukama.
Mukama wangye, Mukama wangye,
Yes’ ompindur’ orikwer’ omu mutima.

Niinyanga kuba nka Yud’ omu mutima, omu mutima,
Niinyanga kukureebya nkawe, Mukama.
Mukama wangye, Mukama wangye.
Niinyanga kuba nka Yud’ omu mutima.

Niinyenda mbe nkaiwe, Yes’, omu mutima, omu mutima,
Babone kukundeebamu, ai Mukama.
Mukama wangye, Mukama wangye,
Niinyenda mbe nkaiwe, Yes’, omu mutima.

songs.title: Yesu, ninkiijuk’ eizooba
verses:
Yesu, ninkiijuk’ eizooba
Eri naakwikiririizeho,
Okab’ Omujuni wangye;
N’ahabw’ekyo ka nkusiime.

Obwo nkakweheera kimwe,
Naab’ owaawe, waab’ owangye;
Waanyiriza haihi naiwe,
Haza naakukuratira.

Kand’ ira nkaba nzaahiire
Omu micwe mibi ey’ensi;
Yesu, waija wanzaahuura,
Mbwenu tinkikurugaho.

Ndyaguma nkukuratire,
Nk’oku naaragaine naiwe;
N’obu ndihik’ aha kufa,
Ndyaguma ninshemererwa.
songs.chorus:
Ka nsiime! Ka nsiime
Yes’ owaanyogiz’ ebibi
Niw’ anyegyes’ obutoosha
Okureeba n’okushaba.
Ka nsiime! Ka nsiime
Yes’ owaanyogiz’ ebibi.

songs.title: Yesu niwe bweshereko
verses:
Yesu niwe bweshereko
Bw’abant’ abari omu kabi;
Tinkitaanuukana nawe,
Niwe buhungiro bwangye.

Tinkitiinisibwa kibi
Ahabw’okwesiga Yesu,
N’obu baakub’ abazigu;
Niwe buhungiro bwangye.
songs.chorus:
Mukama n’Orukiri rugumire,
Rugumire, rugumire;
Mukama n’Orukiri rugumire
Niwe buhungiro bwangye.

songs.title: Eshagama y’Omujuni
verses:
Eshagama y’Omujuni
Niyo yonka ei nyesiga
Tingira bundi bwegamo,
Kureka Mukama wenka.

Byon’ eby’ensi ku biraije,
Ka nyesigy’ eby’omu iguru;
Omu busaasi n’omu kagwe
Tagira bu antsigireho.

Ebi yaaturaganiise
Nibyo bimpamiza kimwe;
N’obu nfeerw’ ebyangye byona,
Niwe wenk’ ou nyesiga.

Ekir’ eki ariiziraho
Aryashanga ntegyereize;
Kandi nyin’ akamanyiso
K’Omwoyo we Orikwera.

songs.title: Nkabon’ oburuhuukiro
verses:
Nkabon’ oburuhuukiro
Omuri Yesu Kristo;
Niwe wenk’ ou nyesiga
Ahabw’ enkojo ze.

Okujunwa nikummara,
Kandi tinkitiina.
Akanshanga ndi omusiisi,
Haza yaanyakiira.

Ku mba ndwaire, niw’ ankiza,
Haza mb’ ohuriire.
Eshagama ye niy’ empa
Amagara masya.

Mpuumuzibw’ Ekigambo kye
Eky’ omuri Baibuli,
Kimpamiza ku njunirwe
Ahabw’Eiziina rye.
songs.chorus:
Tiinyine ki naakuhayo
Kuunyihah’ orubanja,
Kureka Mukama wangye
Yes’ owambambiirwe.

songs.title: Nyin’ Omujuni Yes’
verses:
Nyin’ Omujuni Yes’ otuur’ omu iguru,
Mujuni murungi, kand’ow’embabazi,
Atuura nandeeba, nandind’ ebiro byona;
Ninkweshengyereza, omwikirize.

Nyin’ Omuzaire, niwe yandaganiise
Kump’ amagara ahabw’ Omwana we;
Ku ndimuhurira, naakora gy’ ebi akunda,
Bwanyim’ aryanyeta kuguma nawe.

Kand’ ebijwaro eby’abahikiriire
Nibyo biriheebwa aba Yesu Kristo;
Mbwenu munywani wangye nkaabaasibwa ki,
Naiw’ otung’ ebyaw’ ahari eryo izooba.

Nyin’ obusingye omu mutima gwangye.
Obutari bwa bantu, kurek’ obwa Yesu;
Abantu b’omu nsi tibabwetegyereza,
Tibarikubuha, tibabwihaho.
songs.chorus:
Ninkweshengyerez’ omu iziina rya Yesu,
Ohindukye hati, kand’ omwikirize.

songs.title: N’oh’ ou nyin’ omu iguru
verses:
N’oh’ ou nyin’ omu iguru
Kureka Yesu wenka?
Ka ngume nyeshongore nti,
“Yesu wenka nammara”
Akahutaar’ ahabwangye,
Yancunguz’ eshagama,
Yanteerana na Ruhanga;
Yesu wenka nammara.

N’obu ab’ensi baine bingi,
Yesu wenka nammara;
Kwonka nyowe timbyetenga,
Yesu wenka nammara.
Tibirimu na mugisha,
N’ebishushunga byonka,
Ebya Yesu n’obusingye;
Yesu wenka nammara.

N’obu ndihinduk’ omworo,
Yesu wenka nammara;
Naamanya eby’okunkwatsa;
Yesu wenka nammara.
N’obu emisiri yaakwoma,
N’entookye zikahwaho,
Ente n’embuzi zikafa,
Yesu wenka nammara.

N’obu ndigir’ abazigu,
Yesu wenka nammara;
Ndyabasingurira kimwe;
Yesu wenka nammara.
N’obu ensi yoon’ erampiigye,
Nentur’ okumuhamya,
Byona tibirikumbaasa.
Yesu wenka nammara.

N’obu ndihik’ aha kufa,
Yesu wenka nammara;
Ndyahuumurir’ omuriwe;
Yesu wenka nammara.
Omu kuhururwa kwingi
Ndi aha ncwamba za rufu,
Obwo ndyayeshongora nti,
"Yesu wenka nammara."

songs.title: Ai Mukama waitu Yesu
verses:
Ai Mukama waitu Yesu
Twena n’tukuhimbisa;
Ahakub’ okatufeera,
Yes’ Omujuni waitu.

Ninkuh’ omubiri gwangye
N’omutima n’obwengye;
Kand’ ebi ntungire byona
Bib’ ebyawe, Mujuni.

Ndyaguma ngambire boona
Eby’okujuna kwawe,
Okutari kw’ebicweka,
Oku otuheera busha.

Ka nkusiim’, owancungwire
Okanjunira kimwe,
Kand’ okaguma nondinda;
Yes’, osiimw’ obutoosha.

songs.title: Omujuni wangye Yesu
verses:
Omujuni wangye Yesu,
Ninkukunda, ninkuramya;
Nooyetw’ Omwana gw’entaama
Wa Ruhang’ otahwaho.

Nkaba ndi omu nju y’embohe
Niinyitwa kubi Sitaane,
Kandi nshobeirwe munonga;
Waija, waaginyihamu.

Mbwenu naanye ka nyeheyo
Omubiri n’omutima,
Mbone kub’ omuntu waawe
Ebiro byangye byona.

Mbwenu niiwe nyegamiire,
Yes’ ob’ Omurinzi wangye;
Ogum’ ondind’ obutoosha
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.
songs.chorus:
Aleluya! Ka nkusiime,
Oheebw’ ekitiinisa
Ahabw’eshagama yaawe
Eyaanyereize kimwe.

songs.title: Ndi Omukristaayo
verses:
Ndi Omukristaayo, ndyagumizamu
Ebiro byona, mpiky’ aha kufa.
Ndi Omukristaay’, ekyo ninkihamya,
N’obu ndaashekyererw’ ensi yoona.
Ndi Omukristaayo w’omu mutima;
Eki ntsigaize ninkunda Kristo;
Obu yaabambw’ akaf’ ahabwangye,
Naanye nshemereire kumukunda.

Ndi Omukristaayo; nikintangaaza
Okureeba ngu naanye nkajunwa.
Ndi Omukristaayo; n’obu ndaagwerwe
Akagwe, nkahikwah’ orugamba.
Ndi Omukristaayo, kand’ omurwani,
Niinyog’ omu myambi ya Sitaane;
Engabo yangye n’okwikiriza,
Niy’ enkingir’ egyo myambi yoona.

Ndi Omukristaayo, kand’ omugyenzi;
Ndyagumizamu orugyendo rwangye.
Eby’omuri egi nsi nimbigaya
Habw’amatsiko g’eby’omu iguru.
Ndi Omukristaay’, ekibanja kyangye
Kiri omu iguru, owa Ruhanga;
Tihabayo naku n’obusaasi,
Abaayo boona bashemererwa.

Ndi Omukristaayo, ekyo n’ekintu e-
kihuumuriz’ omutima gwangye,
Kikanyebesa enaku zoona,
Haza nkahurira naaruhuuka.
Ndi Omukristaayo, oku ndi kwona;
N’obu ndiba ndi haihi n’okufa
Tikirinsaas’ ahabw’okugira
Amatsiko g’okuz’ omu iguru.

songs.title: Tindiitwa nshoni na kakye
verses:
Tindiitwa nshoni na kakye
Okuhamya Yesu,
N’okwesig’ ekigambo kye
N’Omusharaba gwe.

Eiziina rya Yesu wangye
Niryo ndikwesiga,
Kandi tarimpemukaho
Tarindeka nkafa.

Byon’ ebi yandaganiise,
Taribihindura;
Kand’ eki naamubiikize
Aryakirinda gye.

N’omu igur’ aryanyemera,
N’obu ntaine ku ndi;
Omu rurembo Saayuuni
Aryampamu omwanya.
songs.chorus:
Aha Musharaba gwe niho yantuuriire
Omutwaro gw’ebicumuro byangye,
Nkamwikiriza, akampa n’okuhweza;
Hati ningyenda nimmusiima.

songs.title: Yezirikye Munonga Kukora
verses:
Yezirikye munonga, okiri ohuriire;
Ku oraab’ okiri muto, nari okuzire,
Ku oraab’ ori omutsigazi, nari omugurusi,
Buri haihi n’okwira; kores’ amaani.

songs.title: Ruhanga wangye, ku ndaagyende
verses:
Ruhanga wangye, ku ndaagyende
Orugyendo ruhango naaza hare,
Onyegyese kwikiriza
Ebi okunda.

Ku ndaabe ndi omu mwirima,
Naaburw’ okushemererwa,
Ompwere, ndekye kwetomboitera
Ebi okunda.

Ku ndaatsigweho banywani bangye,
Naaguma nyin’ eirungu,
Ohuguur’ omutima gwangye,
Haza nkwesigye.

Ku oraanyete kutsigaho
Byon’ ebi ndikukunda,
Naabikuha, n’ebyawe;
Obitware.

Eki ndikwenda niky’ eki;
Onyijuz’ Omwoyo waawe,
Agum’ omu mutima gwangye,
Anyegyese.

Ogum’ ongarure busya,
Onyiheho byon’ ebirikunzibira
Kuguma ningira nti,
Ebi okunda bikorwe.

songs.title: Ai Mukama, Gum’ Onyebembere
verses:
Ai Mukama, gum’ onyebembere
Omu ihamba ry’ens’ egi;
Ndi omweremwa, kwonk’ ompigikiire
N’omukono gw’embabazi.
Onyebembere, kand’ ompabure,
Ntateishuk’ omuhanda,
Mukama Ruhang’ ow’amaani.

Onfumurir’ enshuro z’amaizi
Agarikumar’ eiriho,
Kand’ ompabuz’ enyomyo y’ekicu
Nk’eyaayebembeir’ aba ira.
Kand’ omp’ entanda y’Omwoyo waawe,
Ebe niyo yantunga,
Ntagwer’ eshaz’ omu muhanda.

Ku ndihik’ aha nkungu y’ekyambu,
Obwo bunaku ongumye,
Ndekye kutiin’ amaani ga rufu,
Hakub’ okagisingura.
Ndyayeshongora ebyeshongoro
Eby’okukusingiza,
Naaheza kutabaaruka gye.

songs.title: Mukama, nairirirw’
verses:
Mukama, nairirirw’, onyakire,
Nkiri hare.
Omwirima gwatsimbira kimwe,
Onyakire.
Tindikureeba gye i ndikuza,
Ontware mpora, ndekye kuhaba.

Embabazi zaaw’ ezindinzire
Tizihwaho;
Ziryandaby’ omuri egi ns’ erimu ebigumire.
Bwanyima ku ndihik’ omu iguru,
Ndyaguma nkuhimbis’ obutoosha.

songs.title: Ruhang’ onyirize
verses:
Ruhang’ onyirize
Haihi naiwe,
N’obu waakundabya
Omu busaasi
Byona nimbisiima,
Ku biraanyirize,
Ku biraanyirize,
Haihi naiwe.

N’obu ndairirirwe
Omu ihamba,
Nkeeshegur’ eibaare
Nka Yakobo,
Ninshab’ obutoosha
Ebiraanyirize
Ebiraanyirize
Haihi naiwe.

Haz’ okwo kworekwa
Ku ndaareebe,
Kub’ amatembero
G’okuntembya,
Ndeebe baamaraika
Nibaanyeta kwija,
Nibaanyeta kwija,
Haihi naiwe.

Ku ndaasisiimukye
Omu turo,
Naanye mbyar’ eibaare
Nka Yakobo,
Kab’ akamanyiso
K’okukuhimbisa
Ahabw’okuunyiriza
Haihi naiwe

songs.title: Imwe mwen’ abagyenzi
verses:
Imwe mwen’ abagyenzi
Abashemereirwe,
Mugyende na Mukama,
Niwe Mwebembezi.

Ku muraakund’ abantu,
Mwabaheereza gye,
Nimutwaza nka Yesu,
Muryashemererwa.

Mwijuky’ omusharaba
Ogu yaayekoreire,
Naafa kubi ahabwanyu
Okubacungura.

Mbwenu ku muriguma
Nimutwaza nkawe,
Muryajwekw’ ekirunga
Eky’obusinguzi.

Eby’okuganya byona
N’eby’okushoberwa,
Nigo matembero ge
G’okutemberaho.

Kwonk’ okushaasha kwanyu
Okw’akaanya kakye
Kuryabahaisa bingi
Eby’ekitiinisa.

Imwe mwen’ abagyenzi,
Nimwimutsy’ amaisho,
Mugat’ ahari Yesu,
Niwe Mwebembezi.

songs.title: Nimuza h’, imw’ abagyenzi
verses:
Nimuza h’, imw’ abagyenzi,
Abarikuhingura?
Nituz’ omu ns’ egy’ enungi
Eyaaraganisiibwe.
Orugyendo ni ruhango,
Nituz’ omu rurembo,
Orurembo rw’omu iguru;
Nimwije tugyendane.

Ku murihik’ omu ns’ egyo,
Mbwenu muryaheebwa ki?
Turyaheebw’ ebintu bingi
Hamwe, n’ekitiinisa,
Ebijwaro n’ebirunga,
N’amaizi g’amagara,
Haza tureeb’ Omujuni,
Kandi tugume nawe.

Mbwenu naitwe ku twakwija,
Mukaatutegyereza?
Eego, nikyo turikwenda,
Nimwije tugyendane.
Nimwije tutabatsiga.
Yes’ atutegyereize,
Tugyende naimw’ omu iguru
Omuri egyo nsi nungi.

songs.title: Imwe Bakristaayo 'mwe
verses:
Imwe Bakristaayo ’mwe,
Kaingi mugwerw’ akagwe;
Kwonka mugumizemu
Nimwesiga Mukama.

Mbwenu nimuhurure,
Murwane n’omuzigu,
Mutagaruk’ enyima,
Muri hamwe na Yesu.

Mutarigir’ obwoba
Aha izooba ry’enaku;
Manya ku ob’ omweremwa,
Yes’ ab’ amaani gaawe.

Mwesiime, nshoberwa mwe,
Mujwar’ eby’orugamba,
Mutakaacwek’ entegye,
Nimwija kusingura.

Imw’ engabo za Yesu,
Nimwirooko murwane;
Abazigu ni baingi,
Kwonka muryababinga.

songs.title: Imw’ abakunda Yesu
verses:
Imw’ abakunda Yesu
Mwena mushemererwe,
Tukwatanis’ okusiima
N’okuhimbisa Mukama,
Tukiikiiz’ ekitebe ky’obukama bwe.

Abatari ba Yesu
Nibanga kweshongora;
Kwonk’ itw’ abu yaacungwire
Twena kitushemereire
Okubuzy’ amakuru ag’ okujuna kwe.

Orwo rurembo rwona
Rwijwiremu ebirungi;
N’obu turaabe tukiri
Omu muhanda gw’okuzayo,
N’tuhurira ku tubiin’ omu mutima.

Mbwenu nimuhuumure,
Munagy’ obwob’ enyima;
Tugyende nitweshongora,
Niturab’ omuri egi nsi,
Tutaah’ omu nsi ya Yesu y’omu iguru.
songs.chorus:
Nimwije tugyende,
Tuze Saayuuni omu iguru,
Tutoor’ omuhand’ ogurikuz’
Omu rurembo rwa Mukama.

songs.title: Tugyende na Yesu
verses:
Tugyende na Yesu
Nitumworobera,
Aturind’ omu muhanda gwe
Ku turaayorobe
Nituguma nawe
Ahamwe n’abajunirwe be.

Ku tugwerw’ akagwe
N’ebihikiirizi,
Bimarwah’ okweyoreka kwe;
Titukitetema,
Obwoba buhweire,
Ahakuba nitumwesiga.

Titwine busaasi
Titukishoberwa,
Atujun’ omu naku zoona,
Titukiri booro,
Titukyesaasira,
Turi gy’ ahabw’okumwesiga.

Titurikubaasa 
Kumanyira kimwe
Oburungi bw’okukunda kwe,
Tutakabandize
Kweherayo kimwe
N’okuguma nitumwesiga.

Turyashemererwa,
Turi hamwe nawe,
Nitukora byon’ ebi akunda,
Kandi naatutuma
Hoon’ ah’ arikwenda,
Turyaba tutakishoberwa.
songs.chorus:
Omwesigye kand’ omworobere;
Oryananurwa Yesu, ku orimworobera.

songs.title: Mwije, Ngabo za Yesu
verses:
Mwije, Ngabo za Yesu
Tuz’ aha rugamba;
Mukama wait’ ogwo
Niw’ atwebembeire.
Ka tumukuratire,
Turekye kutiina,
Tugyende tutair’ amaish’ aha
rurango rwe.

Ka tugyend’ omumaisho,
Turwane mashaija,
Tubingye Sitaane
Omuzigu waitu;
Tugume twikirize
Yes’ engabo yaitu,
Tukwaitse rurara yaitu,
Ekitabo kye.

Amahe ga Sitaane
Gatatwits’ obwoba;
Tuhame nk’emanzi,
Nigaija kuhunga.
Twikirize Mukama
Owaasingwir’ ensi,
Ku atarireka Kanisa
Ye kusingurwa

Imwe Bakristaayo ’mwe,
Nimwije tugyende,
Nituteer’ akaari
K’okusingura kwe.
Tumuh’ ekitiinisa
N’ab’omu nsi boona
Hamwe na baamaraika be
Ab’omu iguru.
songs.chorus:
Mwije, Ngabo zoon’ eza Yesu
Tuz’ aha rugamba;
Ogw’ otwebembeire
N’omusinguzi.

songs.title: Murwan' ahabwa Yesu
verses:
Murwan’ ahabwa Yesu,
Imw’ amamanzi ge,
Mukwat’ omusharaba,
Murekye kutiina.
Aha rugamba rwona
Niwe Mukama waanyu,
Otabaasa kubingwa
Omuzigu weena.

Murwan’ ahabwa Yesu
Imw’ amamanzi ge,
N’obu hariho akabi,
Murekye kutiina.
Enzamba ye neegamba,
Nimuhurure nawe,
Mwezirikye, muhame,
Mubingye Sitaane.

Murwan’ ahabwa Yes’ omu 
maani ge gonka,
Amaani g’omubiri
Tigaine mugasho.
Mugyende na rurara,
Niyo Baibul’ erikwera,
Kandi mukwat’ engabo,
Nikwo kwikiriza.

Mutatiin’ orugamba,
N’orw’omwanya mukye;
Hati n’enduuru yaarwo,
Hakye n’okwesiima!
Orikusingur’ ensi
Aryajwekw’ ekirunga;
Kand’ ategyekye hamwe
Na mukama waitu.

songs.title: Danieli akab’ ari emanzi
verses:
Danieli akab’ ari emanzi rugambwa;
Akab’ atagira kintu kyon’ eki atiina.

Ob’ entumwa ya Yesu ey’amazima,
Obone kubarw’ omu ngabo za Danieli.

Bamw’ ab’omu ntoore ze bakasingurwa,
Ahabw’okutooga magara nka Danieli ogwo.

Omuzigu Sitaane naagab’ eihe rye;
Kwonka niriija kusingurw’ erya Danieli.

Mbwenu hamira kimwe, ogyend’ omumaisho
Hurir’ akaari nikateerwa ba Danieli.
songs.chorus:
W’eishe-emwe, b’ emanzi, ba nka Danieli;
Ob’ omuntu wa Yesu, otamwehakana.

songs.title: Rwan’ orugamba rw’okwikiriza
verses:
Rwan’ orugamba rw’okwikiriza,
Yesu niwe maani gaawe;
Gumizamu orugyendo rwawe rw’amagara
N’okushemererwa kwingi.

Gum’ oiruky’ ahabw’embabazi ze
Ogyemir’ ow’ omu iguru.
We niwe muhanda, kandi niwe bihembo
By’abarikumwikiriza.

Orekye kwemerez’ omutima,
Ogum’ oyesigye Yesu;
Ahakuba ku oraamwegyekyerere byona,
Aryaguma naakurinda.

Otatiina, otatentebuka!
Naakukunda, tahinduka;
Ween’ oine Mukama, biri atungire byona,
Eby’omwoyo n’eby’omubiri.

songs.title: Mamanzi ga Yesu
verses:
Mamanzi ga Yesu
Mwije tuhurure,
Omukuru w’orugamba
Niw’ atwebembera.

Mub’ abagumire
Ahabw’amaani ge;
Ween’ omwesigira kimwe
Asingura byona.

Muhamire kimwe
Ahabw’eiziina rye;
Mujwar’ eby’okurwanisa
Eby’omushana gwe.

Omukuru waitu
Ni Yesu Mukama,
Naija kuribatiirira
Amahe g’Omubi.

Abarikwehayo
Kumurwanirira
Niw’ aribatabaarutsya
N’amashemererwa.

songs.title: Turi abaserukare ba Kristo
verses:
Turi abaserukare ba Kristo Yesu,
Niwe Manzi y’okutujuna;
Niw’ atwebember’ omu rugamba rwona,
Kandi turwan’ ahabw’amaani ge.

Tukaragaana nawe kub’ abeesigwa,
Kuguma nitumworobera.
Ka tugyende nawe, tuteer’ abazigu,
Tubone kukiza beene waitu.

Ku turaajwar’ eby’okurwanisa byaitu,
Rurara n’engabo n’enkaito,
Tituritiina muzigu ween’ omubi;
Turyasinguz’ amaani ga Yesu.

Titurikwenda kuba bairu b’ekibi,
Abategyekw’ eby’ omubiri;
Turi abaana ba Yes’ abu yaacungwire,
Kandi titukitegyekw’ Omubi.

Ka tugume tuhweran’ omu rugamba,
Habw’okuba turi ihe rimwe;
Turi ishe-emwe, abain’ amatsiko gamwe,
Nituramy’ Omukam’ omwe wenka.

Habw’amaani ga Yesu turyasingura,
Turwan’ okuhitsy’ aha mperu;
Bwanyima turyaheebw’ ebihembo bingi.
Kandi Ruhang’ aryatuhuumuza.

songs.title: N'oh' oraaz' aha rugamba na Yesu?
verses:
N’oh’ oraaz' aha rugamba na Yesu?
Oraagyende n'oha kubuzy' Engiri?
N'oh' oraikirize kugayw' abantu
N'okubonabon' ahabw'Eiziina rye?

Reeb' ekitiinis' eki twitanira,
Ti ky'omuri egi ensi, n'eky'omu iguru.
Yes' akatufeera; okukunda kwe
Nikwo kutugyema kub' engabo ze.

Yes' akatucunguz' eshagama ye,
Twagira naw' omukag' ogutafa;
Mbwen' ogwo mukago titurigwita,
Turyafeerwa byon' ahabw'Eiziina rye.

Ira tukeehandiikisa kub' abe;
Mbwenu ka tugume tub' abeesigwa,
Turekye kutiina n'okugw' enshazi,
Ahakuba niw' aturwanirira.

N'obu aba Sitaane bagir' amaani
G'okurwana naitwe, titubatiina;
Engabo za Yesu tizisingurwa,
Ahabw'okuba niw' azeebembera.
songs.chorus:
Beitu turi ab'oha? Turi aba Yesu;
Sitaane tukamwimuurira kimwe.

songs.title: Omuntu ween’ orikwenda
verses:
Omuntu ween’ orikwenda okub’ emanzi,
Akuratir’ obutoosha Mukama waitu
Tihariho kintu kyon’ ekirimwefuurisa
Eki yaaraganiis’ ira kub’ omugyenzi.

Abarimugambir’ eby’okumwits’ obwoba,
Nabo baryaremw’ ahakuba we n’emanzi;
Tihaine muzigu ween’ orimuz’ omu kaso,
Nari orimuzibira ngu atab’ omugyenzi.

songs.title: Yesu tumwin’, abazigu
verses:
Yesu tumwin’, abazigu
Nitubabinga,
Ogwo niw’ atwebembeire
Kutusinguza.

Reeb’ amahe ga Sitaane,
Ageebembeire;
Mbwen’ amamanzi nigagwa,
Twahw’ amatsiko.

Reeb’ amacumu ga Sitaane
Nigatyankana;
Kwonka twin’ Emanzi rugambwa,
Titurikugatiina.

Orugamba n’orw’amaani,
Kwonka tuhame;
Yesu ari haihi kwija,
Twena tugume.
songs.chorus:
Yesu naagir’ ati, Muhame!
Ndi hamwe naimwe;
Tumugarukyemu tuti,
Mbwenu twahama.

songs.title: Itw’ ab’omuri B.B.
verses:
Itw’ ab’omuri B.B., n’tukushaba, Yesu,
Otuh’ omusha, tukuheereze gye;
Niiwe Mukuru w’eihe, turi engabo zaawe,
Omu ngamba zaitu zoona tukuhimbisise.

Itw’ ab’omuri B. B., otuh’ okukora
Emirimo yaitu yoon’ ei otuhaire,
Tukore n’obwesigwa, n’obu haakubaho
Akabi nari, obusaasi, tutacwek’ entegye.

Omu magara gaitu otuhwere, Yesu,
Turwanis’ ebibi ebirikutwosya,
Turwanir’ ekirunga, ekitarihunduuka,
Tugyende tugyemir’ orurembo rwa Saayuuni.
songs.chorus:
Mukam’, itw’ ab’omuri B. B.
Otuh’ omugisha,
Turwane mashaija,
Otusinguze.

songs.title: Yes’ akir’ abandi boona
verses:
Yes’ akir’ abandi boona
Kutukunda;
Okukunda kwe kukir’ okw’enyineemwe.
Banywani baitu b’omu nsi
Bo nibatuhararuka;
Kwonka We tahararuka
Banywani be.

N’enki ekihais’ amagara
Gatahwaho?
N’okumanya Yesu waitu
Otukunda.
Tukaba turi nk’entaama,
Eziburiir’ omu ihamba,
Yaatusher’ra, yaatutaasy’ omu busyo bwe.

Yesu ni Munywani waitu
W’obutoosha;
Kand’ atwendez’ omugisha
N’obusingye.
Emitima yait’ ekunda
Kumuhurir’ obutoosha,
N’okuguma hamwe nawe
Ehuumwire.

Ahabw’Eiziina rye rirungi
Tusaasirwa,
Kandi tubing’ abazigu,
Batuhunga.
Aryatuh’ emigisha ye,
Aturind’ akabi koona,
Kand’ atuhitsy’ omu iguru
Ei atuura.

songs.title: Okukunda kwa Yesu
verses:
Okukunda kwa Yesu
Kukamureet’ omu nsi,
Yaij’ omuriitw’ abantu
Kutwihah’ orubanja.

Abatakatungire
Magar’ agatahwaho,
Itwe tubamanyise
Okukunda kwa Yesu

Nk’oku yaatukunzire,
Akatufeera twena,
Naitwe ka tumukunde,
Kandi tumworobere.

Kandi ku arigaruka
Okuz’ aha ngoma ye,
Turyahur’r’ eiraka rye,
Naagir’ ati: Mwebare!
songs.chorus:
Yesu nankunda,
Yesu nankunda,
Yesu nankunda
Niwe yanfeereire.

songs.title: Yes’ Omujuni wangye nankunda
verses:
Yes’ Omujuni wangye nankunda,
Tindikumanya eki arikunkundir’ atyo,
Akaij’ ira kujun’ abasiisi;
N’ahabw’ekyo mmukundira kimwe.

Yesu Mukama wangy’ akanjuna,
Kwonka tindikumany’ oku yaakitwarize;
Nyow’ eki ndikumanya ni kimwe,
Akanfeera, kandi yancungura.
songs.chorus:
Ka nsiime Yes’ Omujuni wangye,
Ou naaheereire kimw’ omutima gwangye;
Ka nsiime Yes’ Omujuni wangye,
Ohimbisibw’ obutoosha bwona.

songs.title: Okukunda nk’okwa Yesu Kristo
verses:
Okukunda nk’okwa Yesu Kristo tikukareebwaga,
Kandi nikwo kurituhitsya twen’ omu bukama bwe.

Tihain’ ogir’ esaasi nka Yesu omunyambabazi,
Amaganya n’enaku zaitu niwe wenk’ obimanya.

Eiraka rirungi nk’erya Yesu, tihain’ origira;
Ayet’ abantu n’embabazi, ngu bamukuratire.

Mbwenu ka tworober’ eiraka rye, tukor’ ebi akunda,
Okuhitsy’ obu turihika owaitu omu iguru.
songs.chorus:
Rukundo ya Yesu etakareebwaga!
Ij’ ahari Ogw’ orikukukunda; reeb’ akutegyereize.

songs.title: Ai Yesu Nkunzi yangye
verses:
Ai Yesu Nkunzi yangye,
Ka mpungir’ ahariiwe;
Ahakub’ amaganya
N’enaku binduhize.
Ai Mujuni, nshereka,
Birekye kumpikaho;
Ogum’ onyebembere
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.

Tiinyine buhungiro,
Niiwe ndikwegamira;
Mujun’, otantsigaho.
Nkabur’ ow’okundinda.
Niiwe bwesigye bwangye,
Kand’ Omuhwezi wangye;
Ogum’ ombumbatire
Omu mapapa gaawe.

Oin’ embabazi nyingi
Ezitarikuhwaho;
Abagwir’ obaimutsye,
N’abarwair’ obakize.
Ori Orikwera, Yesu,
Kand’ ori ohikiriire;
Nyowe ndi omunyabibi
Kand’ orengyesereize.

Ai Mukam’, ori enshuro
Y’amaizi g’amagara;
Ka nkunyweho, mpw’ eiriho,
Ob’ enshur’ omuriinye.
Kand’ ogum’ onyijuze,
Amaizi g’egyo nshuro
Gabe maing’ omuriinye.
Garekye kwom’ obundi.

songs.title: Okukunda kwa Yesu
verses:
Okukunda kwa Yesu
Tikwetegyerezibwa;
Omwoyo w’ Orikwera
Niw’ akunshuruurira;
Kand’ akamp’ obusingye
Omu mutima gwangye,
Haza bukandeetera
Okwesiima kuhango.
Mbwen’ okuruga hati
Ndi owe, nawe n’owangye.

Ebitarikumanywa
Mbwenu ho nimbimanya,
Byona mbishuururiirwe
Embabazi ze nyingi;
Ebyeremwa by’egi nsi
Ruhang’ abitoorana,
Ngu akwats’ enshoni boona
Abarikubigaya.
Mbwen’ okuruga hati
Ndi owe, nawe n’owangye.

songs.title: Ka tugarukye tweshongore
verses:
Ka tugarukye tweshongore
Aha mukago gw’ ogutafa,
Aha shagam’ eyaaseesirwe
Aha kabungo Gologosa.

Nimwije mwen’ abaruhire,
Mwogy’ omu shagama ya Yesu;
Muheebwe amagara masya
N’ekiconc’ eki aheera busha.

Ku turoz’ aha migisha ye,
Atwijuz’ amashemererwa;
Kiryaba kita twamureeba?
Turyayesiima, tunanukye.
songs.chorus:
Twena twimutsy’ amaraka gaitu,
Obutoosha tusiime Yesu;
Twena twimutsy’ amaraka gaitu,
Okuhitsy’ obu turimureeba.

songs.title: Rukundo  ya Yesu
verses:
Rukundo  ya Yesu
Nikyo kyeshongoro
Kyangy’ ou yaakunzire Haza ntashemeire.
Nyowe niiny’ oha, Mukama
Kunkunda, kand’ akanfeera?

Akaija’ omu ns’ egi
Ahabw’okutujuna,
Kwonka sh’ itwe titwamwetamu ka buntu!
Bambe, Munywani wangy’ ogwo
Yaafa ngu naanye nshemere!

Bamwe baamwarira
Ebijwaro byabo,
Baamuhimbisa ngu, Hosan’ Iwe Kristo!
Hakye boona baahinduka,
Bati, Mumwiheho abambwe!

Bakeshengyereza
Ngu babambe Yesu,
Baashaba kuheebwa Barabb’ omunyagi;
Kufa ngu bo bakaakira.

Omu magara ge
Taratungire nju,
Kand’ ekituuro kye kyab’ eky’entiizano.
Ow’ ekab’ eri omu iguru!
Owangy’ eri omu kituuro!

Ka mbeeshongorere
Eby’orwo rukundo;
Kandi nintangaar’ ahabw’okunkund’ atyo!
Yes’ ogwo ni Nkunzi yangye!
Ndyaguma nimmuhimbisa.

songs.title: Yes’ akaija kunsher’ra
verses:
Yes’ akaija kunsher’ra
Ndi har’ omu bibi,
Yampeek’ aha mabega,
Yangarur’ omuka;
Baamaraik’ ab’omu iguru
Baakireeba, baatangaara.

Akanshanga mputaire,
Ndi haihi n’okufa,
Yanshemb’ obwo buhuta,
Atyo yantambira;
Yampuumuriza mpor’ ati,
Naakubona, ori owangye.

Yaanyorek’ enkojo ze
Ez’omu biganja bye,
Kandi n’ez’ekirunga
Ky’amahw’ omu mutwe;
Naayebuuz’ eki yankundiir’
Akeehayo kunfeer’ atyo.

Mbwenu ndi hamwe nawe,
Niw’ ampuumuriza;
Anjwisiz’ omushana
Gw’okummurikira,
Kandi nguma niinyijuka
Emigish’ ei yampaire.

N’ahabw’ekyo mpumwire,
Kandi ntegyereize
Ekyo kiro kikuru
Eki ariiziraho;
Haz’ obwo ndyatabaaruka,
Mmushangye ntakiine kibi.
songs.chorus:
Reeb’ oku atukunda,
Kand’ oku atusher’ra,
N’eshagam’ eyaatucungwire;
Titwin’ oku twakubigamba.

songs.title: Nyine Munywani wangye
verses:
Nyine Munywani wangye owaabandize kunkunda,
Rukundo y’ etakareebwaga niyo yaamumpikize;
Mbwenu ntuura nimpeereza munywani wangye ogwo,
Hati ndi owe, nawe n’owangye ebiro byangye byona.

Munywani wangy’ ogwo Yesu akaij’ ira kunjuna;
Yamp’ amagara masya, kandi yaagaruka yaanyeha.
Tinkimwima byangye byona, amaani n’amagara
Obwengye n’ebind’ ebi nyine bib’ eby’ ebiro byona.

Munywani wangy’ ogwo niwe yaahairw’ amaani goona
G’okundind’ omu muhanda gwe, n’okumpitsy’ omu iguru.
Ku ndanzy’ eby’ekitiinisa, ebi yambiikiireyo,
Bindeetera kugarukwamu amaani n’amatsiko.

Munywani wangy’ ogwo Yesu n’ow’embabazi nyingi,
Omurinzi orikwesigwa, kand’ Omuhi w’obwengye;
Ebiriho n’ebiribaho tibirintaanisa
Na Munywani wangy’ ogwo Yesu; ndi ow’ obutwire bwona.

songs.title: Yesu, okanfeera
verses:
Yesu, okanfeera
Ahabw’okunkunda;
Mbwenu nkwimire ki
Omutima gwangye?
Byona ka mbikuhe,
Mb’ owaawe buzima;
Okukwehongyera
Nibwo busingye.

Nootutonganira
Ahari Tataitwe;
Tuh’ amaani gaawe,
Tukuheereze.
Tugambire boona
Ebi waatukoreire,
Tukuhimbisise
Omu micwe yaitu.

Ninkundira kimwe
Kushushana naiwe,
Obutoosha ngume
Nkor’ ebi okunda.
Abari omu naku
Mbagirir’ esaasi,
N’ab’omu mwirima
Mbakureetere.

Ebi nyine byona
Niiwe waabimpaire;
Ka mbikusiimire,
Mukama wangye.
Ku ndiz’ omu iguru,
Naareebana naiwe,
Ndyaguma ndi owaawe
Ninkuheereza.

songs.title: Hurir’ ebi Mukama
verses:
Hurir’ ebi Mukama
Arikugamba naiwe;
Naakubuuza naagira,
Ati, Beitu nonkunda?

Nkakujuna, naakwiha
Omu mwirima mwingi,
Naakwih’ omu kihome
Ky’omuzigu Sitaane,

Noogira ngu omukazi
Akaayebwa’ omwana we?
W’ akaabaasa kumwebwa,
Kwonka nyowe tikwo ndi.

Kand’ okukunda kwangye
Kukir’ ebindi byona;
Kukiza rufu amaani,
Kandi tikurihwaho.

Eby’ ebi naakozire
Nkabikor’ ahabwawe;
Mbwenu reka nkubuuze,
Mwana wangye, nonkunda?

Mukama, noomanya ngu
Nyin’ okukunda kukye;
Kwonka ninkushab’ ompe
Okukunda kuhango.

songs.title: Mukama, ninkukunda
verses:
Bwanyima ku ndihik’ owaitu omu iguru,
Ndyaguma nkuhimbise, kandi nkusiime,
Nkujuumair’ omumaisho ninkweshongorera nti,
songs.chorus: Tinkakukundaga, nk’oku ndikukukunda.

songs.title: Obusingy’ obu Yes’ ah’
verses:
Obusingy’ obu Yes’ ah’ abantu be
Buri nk’omugyera gw’amaizi maingi;
Ababwine boona bubahuumuza,
Buguma nibukany’ ebiro byona.

Abu Yes’ arinda n’emikono ye,
Tihaine muzigu oribakoraho;
Tihariho kibaasa kwemereza
Emitim’ erindw’ Omujuni waitu.
songs.chorus:
Gum’ omwegyekyerer’ ebyawe byona,
Obone kugira obusingye bwe.

songs.title: Yesu ah’ obusingye bwijwire
verses:
Yesu ah’ obusingye bwijwire
Ahabw’eshagama y’ ei yaaseesire.

Emirabanamu yoon’ ey’ensi
Tebaasa kutwihah’ obwo busingye.

Enaku z’ensi ku zitushanga,
Omuriwe tizigira ki zitwitsa.

Bagyenzi bait’ abaturi hare,
Yes, abarinda gye, naitw’ aturinda.

Ebiriija, tihain’ obimanya,
Kwonka Mukama naabimanya byona.

Omu naku kandi n’omu rufu,
Nangwa namw’ atuh’ obusinguzi bwe.

Eby’ensi byona ku birihwaho,
Turyaheebw’ obusingye bw’omu iguru.

songs.title: Ira nkaba ningira nti
verses:
Ira nkaba ningira nti,
Ningyenda gye na Yesu;
Kwonk’ okub’ ow’ amazima
Nkaba mpindahinduka.

Bwanyima yaanyeta kwija
N’okureka kutiina;
Ku naamwesigiire kimwe,
Yamp’ obwo busingye bwe.

Mbwenu tinkibanganisa,
Tinkigindahinduka;
Mukama nanshembutsya gye
Omu mihanda mibi.

Obutoosha niw’ andinda
Nyomushana na nyekiro;
Tinditiina kabi koona,
Ndyaguma nshemereirwe.
songs.chorus:
Obusingye bwa Yesu,
Obu ntakareebaga,
Hati nibunshemeza;
Ka mmwesigire kimwe.

songs.title: Hakabaho eihunga ringi
verses:
Eryo ihunga ryacureera,
Waacureeza n’ebingonzi
Ahabw’okuhurir’ eiraka ryawe.

Naitw’ abantu ku tugira
Ebihikiirizi by’ensi,
Tutiin’ oshush’ oti, Twaza kuhwaho.

songs.title: Yesu aryategyek’ egi nsi
verses:
Yesu aryategyek’ egi nsi yoona,
Ah’ eizooba ririkuhika;
Obukama bwe bubugy’ omu muhanga,
Okuhitsy’ obu ens’ eg’ erihwaho.

Abantu b’omu mahanga goona
Beesiim’ ahabw’okukunda kwe,
N’abaana bato bamuhimbisa hoona
Nibasingiz’ Eiziina rye ryonka.

Ah’ emigisha y’ ekanya hoona,
Embohe zoona zirekurwa,
Kand’ abaruhire nab’ abaruhuura,
N’abakyene boona bakyenuuka.

Mbwenu buri omwe ayeimukire,
Ahimbise Mukama waitu;
Na baamaraika beeshongore munonga,
Naitwe twikirize tut’, Amiina.

songs.title: Yesu n’Omuriisa waitu
verses:
Yesu n’Omuriisa waitu entaama ze;
Ka tugyende nawe, atwebembere.
Ah’ariza hoona tituritiina,
Ahabw’okuba We atukiikiire.

Yesu n’Omuriisa waitu entaama ze,
Nitumany’ eiraka rye ry’embabazi;
Eryo iraka niryo ritushemeza,
Kandi rituhana, twakora kubi.

Yesu n’Omuriisa owaacungwire
Entaama ze zoona n’eshagama ye;
Kandi niw’ atuh’ Omwoy’ Orikwera,
Tukahinduk’ ab’omu iriisizo rye.

Yesu n’Omurinzi waitu entaama ze,
N’obu empitsi n’emishega biriija;
N’obu turihikwaho akabi koona,
Itwe tituritiin’, aryab’ atwine.

songs.title: Mukama niwe Muriisa
verses:
Mukama niwe Muriisa,
Ondiisa n’okukunda,
Kandi tindikyena kintu kyona,
Naaguma ndi owe buzima.

Atwara haihi n’ebyambu
By’amaizi g’amagara,
Omu iriisizo ry’obunyaatsi buto
Kand’ okwo niy’ andiisiza.

Agarur’ amagara masya
Omu magara gangye;
Anyebember’ omu muhanda gwe
Ogurimpitsy’ omu iguru.

Ira kaindi nkaba ndara,
Kwonka’ aguma nansher’ra,
Akimbon’, andeet’ aha mabega ge,
Angarur’ ashemereirwe.

Ku ndirab’ omu ruhanga
Rw’ekibunda ky’okufa,
Tinditiina bi ndibuganamu,
Ahabw’okub’ aryab’ anyine.

Anteekateekyer’ emeeza
Omu maisho g’abanyanga;
Kand’ ekikopo kyangye kiijwire
Omugisha, nigusheesheka.

Embabazi za Mukama
Tiziba z’okuhwaho;
Mbwenu ka nkusiim’ ebiro byona,
Mukam’ Omuriisa wangye.

songs.title: Mukama waitu n’Omuriisa
verses:
Mukama waitu n’Omuriisa wangye,
Kandi tarimpemukaho;
Nk’oku ndi owe, kandi naw’ akab’ owangye,
Tindikyena kintu kyona.

Anseetur’ obutoosha kuza kurya
Obunyaatsi bw’oruhiira,
Antwar’ aha maizi ge g’amamure,
Nigo maizi g’amagara.

Akantaarura, yankiz’ oburare
Ahabwa rukundo ye yonka;
Atyo yampitsya gye omu ka y’entaama ze
Ampeekir’ aha mabega.

Ku mba ndi hamwe na Mukama wangye,
Naahikwaho akabi koona,
Tingira kintu kyon’ ekintiinisa,
Ahabw’ okub’ ab’ anyine.

Andiis’ eby’okurya bye, binyigutsa,
Kand’ angirir’ embabazi,
Anywais’ aha maizi g’amagara masya,
Haz’ ngarukwamu amaani.

Ka nsingize Mukama wangye Yesu
Ahabw’ebirungi bye byona,
N’ahabw’emigisha ye yoon’ etahwaho,
Ei ah’ abaana be boona.

songs.title: Yesu ni Munywani waitu
verses:
Yesu ni Munywani waitu,
Niw’ atwekorerera
Emitwaro y’obusaasi,
Etuur’ eturemire.
Reeba, tubur’ obusingye,
Tububuzibwa busha,
Ahabw’okutamushaba gye
Byon’ ebi tukyenire.

Sitaane ku araatugyeze
N’ebihikiirizi bye,
Turekye kwehw’ amatsiko,
Tubitwarire Yesu.
Tihariho Mujuni ondi.
Okwatanisa naitwe
Omu busaasi bwaitu bwona,
Kureka Yesu wenka.

Ku oraagir’ enaku nyingi,
Waahahaaz’ omutima,
Obuhungiro ni Yesu,
Gum’ omwesherekiremu.
Ku oraagaywe, waatsigwaho
Bagyenzi baawe boona,
Oyeshengyereze Yesu,
Akuhuumuze juba.

songs.title: N’twenda kureeba Yesu
verses:
N’twenda kureeba Yes’, ahabw’okuba
Obwire bw’amagara nibwira;
Mbwenu nitwenda ngu atuh’ amaani ge,
Okwikiriza kwaitu kuhame.

N’twenda kureeba Yes’, ahabw’okuba
Twin’ enaku n’emirabanamu;
Ebindi n’obu twabirabiremu,
Kwonka hakiriho ebirikwija.

N’twenda kureeba Yes’, ahabw’okuba
Niwe Rukiri orugumire;
Ku tumureeba, okufa n’endwara
Tibibaasa kututetemesa.

N’twenda kureeba Yes’, ahabw’okuba
Eby’ensi bigyenda nibihwaho;
Kwonk’ ahabwabyo titurikutonzya,
Ahakuba Yesu We tahwaho.

N’twenda kureeba Yes’, ahabw’okuba
N’obu tufeerwa bagenzi baitu,
Omu busaasi bwait’ atuhuumuriza;
Titutonzya, tugir’ amatsiko.

songs.title: Yesu, niiwe wenk’ ou nshangiremu
verses:
Yesu, niiwe wenk’ ou nshangiremu
Obusingye n’okushemererwa;
Ira nkaba ntuura nimbwetenga,
Kwonka bumburirira kimwe.

Nkaba nyeteng’ eby’okweshemeza,
Haz’ Iwe ntarikukwetenga;
Kwonka n’obu naabaire ntakwetaho,
Okankwatisa rukundo yaawe.

Nkaba nz’ aha iziba ry’eby’ens’ egi,
Eiriho rir’ ery’okunyita;
Nkiba naateeraho nt’ entama, gooma,
Ngaruka nyehweir’ amatsiko.

Ku naabaire ndi aho nyeshobeire,
Mbuzir’ eigur’ obutembero,
Embabazi zaawe zampumuura,
Naakureeba gye, naananuka.
songs.chorus:
Yesu, tiharih’ ondiijo weena
Orikubaasa kutumara;
Rukundo n’amagar’ agatahwaho
Birug’ omuriiwe wenka.

songs.title: Yes’ enshuro y’amagara
verses:
Yes’ enshuro y’amagara,
Eby’ensi tibitugasiire;
Mbwenu hati twaij’ ahariiwe,
Ngu otumar obukyene bwona.

Otuur’ ori ow’amazima,
Ojun’ abarikukutakira;
Okunda boon’ abakusher’ra,
N’abakureeb’, obahuumuza.

Yes’ Omugaati gw’amagara,
Twin’ enjara, gum’ oturiise;
Twin’ eiriho, gum’ otunywaise
Amaizi gaaw’ ag’amagara.

Emirabanamu ey’omu nsi
Etwihah’ obusingye bwawe;
Kwonka ku tureeb’ amaisho gaawe,
Tugir’ omugisha, twesiima.

Ai Yes’, Ij’ ogume naitwe,
Ocureez’ emitima yaitu,
Obingy’ omwirima gw’ekibi,
Ensi yoon’ ejwerw’ omushana.

songs.title: Nintangaarira rukundo ya Yesu
verses:
Nintangaarira rukundo ya Yesu Kristo,
Ninshoberw’ ahabw’embabaz’ ez’ angirira;
Ku mmanya ngu niinye yaabambiirwe, ntetema,
Nyow’ enkozi y’ebibi, ou yaafeereire.

Kand nintangaarir’ ekyamwihir’ omu iguru
Kujuna nkaany’ omugomi omunyamaryo,
Ngu abone kuncungur’, amp, okuhikiirira,
Ahabw’okukunda kw’ okutakareebwaga.

Kand’ obundi nteekateek’ aha biganja bye,
Ebyahutaaziibwe ngu nyihweh’ orubanja.
Mbwen’ ekyo ndyakyebwa? Ngaaha, nikikabure!
Kureka ndyaguma mmuhimbis’ obutoosha.
songs.chorus:
N’eky’okutangaaza,
Naany’ okuunyijuk’, akambonabonera!
Ka nikintangaaza okukira byona.

songs.title: Yes’ akangirir’ embabazi
verses:
Yes’ akangirir’ embabazi
Nyingi ezitakareebwaga,
Obu yanfeera Gologosa,
Eshagama y’ ekasheesheka.

Nkaba naayehweir’ amatsiko
Habw’okugir’ ebibi bingi,
Kwonk’ ezo mbabazi za Yesu
Zampungiz’ aha musharaba.

Twijwir’ amabara g’ebibi,
Mbwenu n’enki ekyakugatwozya?
Kurek’ ekyambu ky’eshagama
Twejabikyemu, haza twere.

Tuheerwa bush’ ezo mbabazi
Ahabw’okwikiriza kwonka;
Imw’ abamwiniir’ ekihika,
Nimurahukye muzaakiire.
songs.chorus:
Embabazi zaawe, Yesu,
Tizigira bugarukiro,
Nizo zinsaasiz’ ebibi
Habw’eshagama yaawe yonka.

songs.title: Hariho eiziin’ erikir’ agandi
verses:
Hariho eiziin’ erikir’ agandi,
Eri nkunda kuhurira,
Nkenda kurigambir’ abantu boona.
Oku ringirir’ omugasho.

Rimmanyis’ eby’Owankunzire
Akasheesh’ eshagama ye,
Ekanyih’ omu buhuuku bw’ekibi,
Nkatungira kimw’ obusingye.

N’erya Yesu, otamb’ enaku
Ezitabaasibwa bantu,
Kand’ osaasira hamwe n’abantu be
Omu kubonabona kwabo.

Ku mba nyin’ obwoba nshobeirwe,
Niryo ryonk’ erimpuumuza,
Nkakir’ obwoba n’amaganya goona,
Nkeesigira kimw’ Omujuni.

Mbwenu ka tusingize Yesu
Habw’Eiziina ry’ erikuru,
Eritashoboororwa muntu weena,
Eiziin’ eritakareebwaga.

songs.title: Ninkusiima, Omujuni
verses:
Ninkusiima, Omujuni,
Ahakub’ okanyozya,
Waanyijuz’ Omwoyo waawe,
Kandi wamp’ emigisha.

Ngir’ omufuregye gwawe,
Ngume ndabwemu amaizi
G’okunywais’ abandi bantu,
Abatakajunirwe.

Gum’ onyozye obutoosha,
Ngume ndi enjoga yaawe,
Kand’ ompe n’amaani gaawe,
Mbone kukuheereza.

Ka ngume mb’ ow’okuhamya
Eby’okujuna kwawe.
Okangura ngu mb’ owaawe,
Mbwen’ onyetegyekyere.

Abarikwehayo twena
Twijuz’ Omwoyo waawe,
Emigyera y’ago maizi
Egum’ ehimintikye.
songs.chorus:
Mbwenu ka mb’ eshuro yaawe
Y’amaizi g’amagara,
Agampimintikiramu
Nyomushana na nyekiro.

songs.title: Tiharih’ ohikiriir’ omu ns’ egi
verses:
Tiharih’ ohikiriir’ omu ns’ egi,
Kandi n’omu iguru tarimu,
Kurek’ abayogiibw’ omu shagama
Ya Yesu, Omujuni waitu.

Ogyenda n’Omujuni bur’ izooba?
Oroogiibw’ omu shagama ye?
Noohuumurir’ aha musharaba gwe?
Oroogiibw’ omu shagama ye?

Omujuni Yesu ku arigaruka,
Aryakushang’ oyogire gye
Omu shagama y’Omwana gw’entaama,
Oshemereire kumureeba?
songs.chorus:
Iw’ oraizire aha Mujuni?
Oroogiibw’ omu shagama ye?
Ebibi byawe birakusaasiirwe?
Ebijwaro byawe nibyera?

songs.title: Iwe torikwenda kutuurw’ ebibi?
verses:
Iwe torikwenda kutuurw’ ebibi?
Irook’ oshangy’ Omujuni!
Kandi n’okugir’ obusinguzi
Ahabw’eshagama ya Yesu?

Nooyenda kukir’ amaryo goona?
Irook’ oshangy’ Omujuni!
Akugir’ omucureezi nkawe
Ahabw’eshagama ye yonka.

Iwe torikwenda kwera tititi?
Irook’ oshangy’ Omujuni!
Mwemer’ akwozy’ ebyo bibi byawe,
Abone kukushemeza gye.

Hati nooyenda kumwehongyera?
Irook’ oshangy’ Omujuni!
N’okumuheerez’ ebiro byona
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa kwawe?
songs.chorus:
Egyo shagama y’Omujuni
Amaani gaayo ni maingi
Kandi n’agatakareebwaga,
Niyo yonk’ erikwozy’ ebibi.

songs.title: Yesu, ninkwetenga
verses:
Yesu, ninkwetenga
Buri kaanya koona,
Ahabw’okuba niiwe
Wenk’ ompuumuriza

Yesu, ninkwetenga,
Guma haihi naanye;
Ku mba hamwe naiwe,
Ebyosyo tibimbaasa.

Gum’ ompuumurize,
Ndi kubi, nshobeirwe;
Ku oraab’ otaizire,
Niinyehw’ amatsiko.

Yesu, ninkwetenga,
Nyegyes’ ebi okunda;
Korer’ omuriinye
Ebi waaraganiise.

Yesu, ninkwetenga,
Mukam’ Orikwera,
Ompindur’ omwana
Waaw’ omu mazima.
songs.chorus:
Nyekiro na nyomushana,
Yesu, ninkwetenga;
Naija, Mukama wangye,
Omp’ omugisha.

songs.title: Otampingura, Mujuni
verses:
Otampingura, Mujuni,
Ninkutakira;
Ku oraataayaayir’ abandi,
Naany’ otantsiga.

Onyirize haihi naiwe,
Mpeebw’ embabazi;
Ntsimbir’ amaju nintonzya,
Mp’ okukwesiga.

Tiinyin’ ondijo Mujuni
Okwihaho Iwe;
Ntambira, nyin’ obujune,
Yes’, onsaasire.

Niiw’ onkirir’ amagara,
Omp’ obusingye;
Tiinyine matsiko agandi
Kureka Iwe.
songs.chorus:
Yesu, Mujuni,
Ninkutakira;
Ku oraataayaayir’ abandi,
Naany’ otantsiga.

songs.title: Nk’oku empara egir’ eiriho
verses:
Nk’oku empara egir’ eiriho
Ekeeteng’ amaizi,
Ai Ruhanga, nikwo naanye
Nyeteng’ embabazi zaawe.

Niiwe Mukam’ otarihwaho,
Maizi g’amagara;
Mbwenu ndyakureeba ryari,
Nkahuumura, nkaruhuuka.

Mbwenu, iwe mutima gwangye,
Oshobereirwe ki?
Ikiriz’ Ogw’ otaremwa
Kutambir’ abashobeirwe

Mbwenu reka kuhw’ amatsiko,
Ahakuba Ruhanga
Niwe nshuro y’amagara,
Egumaho ebiro byona.

songs.title: Esh’ owaakubon’ omutima
verses:
Esh’ owaakubon’ omutima
Gusingwir’ ekibi,
Ogumiisiirw’ eshagama
Eyaaseesirw’ ahabwangye.

Kand’ omutim’ ogwerekwire,
Gutakyeyendeza,
Ogwijwire Yesu wenka,
Ogutakyefuuza by’ensi.

Oguhendekire, gworobi,
Gw’amazima gonka,
Ogu eby’ensi bitabaasa
Kutaanisa na Mukama

Oguba musya bur’ izooba
Ogwijwire rukundo,
Ogutaikarwamu kibi,
Nk’ogwawe, Mukama wangye.

Mukama wangye, ninkushaba,
Ompwere, mbe nkaiwe;
Kand’ ompangyemu omutima
Ogurikukworobera.

songs.title: Mukam’ ow’ekitiinisa
verses:
Mukam’ ow’ekitiinisa,
Ninkukunda;
Kandi naakweshengyereza
Rukund’ egyo
Ku eb’ ey’ebiro byona
Waanyikiriza
Ahabw’embabazi waawe;
Mbwenu ngiine.

Nkaba nyin’ ebibi bingi
Nibinshinja,
Waabiinyihaho, wankiza,
Naakusiima.
Mbwenu ka nkuhimbise
Nyin’ obunanukye,
N’ebiri omuriinye byona
Ka mbikuhe.

Ninkusiimis’ omutima
Gwangye gwona
Ebiro byona omushanju,
Ti kimwe kyonka.
N’obu naakuhitsya ryari
Ninkuhimbisa,
Ebyo biro nabyo bikaaba
Biri bikye.

songs.title: Eby'okweshemez' ebyensi
verses:
Eby'okweshemez' ebyensi
Tibiine mutambo gwona;
Okaabandize kusher’ra
Obukama bwa Yesu

Ebyo byona nibihwaho,
Kandi nibigasha kakye;
Kwonk’ obukama bwa Yesu
N’obw’ebiro n’ebiro.

Embabazi za Ruhanga
Iw’ obe nizo waasher’ra;
Hati ku mwakuzireeba,
Okaatung’ obusingye.

Eby’Omwoy’ ebi twetenga
Bitugirir’ omugasho
Okukir’ eby’omubiri
Ebitarigumaho.

N’ahabw’eky’ eky’okubanza
N’obukama bwa Ruhanga,
N’okusher’ra beene waitu,
Tukabamureetera.

Mbwenu ka tushabe Yesu
Atuh’ amaani g’Omwoyo,
Obukama bwe bubugye
Omu mahanga goona.

songs.title: Ab’emitim’ eshemeire
verses:
Ab’emitim’ eshemeire
Nibo bain’ emigisha mingi,
Kandi baryareeba Ruhanga waitu,
Bain’ amashemererwa.

Mukam’ abashuuruurira
Emibonano ey’Omwoyo;
Emitima y’abo barikwera be
Niy’ eba hekalu ye.

Mukam’ owaatsigireho
Ekitiinisa ky’omu iguru
Akeecureez’, akabambw’ aha muti
Ahabwait’ abasiisi.

Boon’ abarikwecureeza,
Akunda munong’ okubeeha;
Kand’ ayenda kutuur’ omu bantu be
B’emitim’ eshemeire.

Mukama, nitukushaba,
Otuh’ egyo migisha yaawe,
Emitima yait’ egum’ eshemeire,
Ebe hekalu yaawe.

songs.title: Yesu, ninkweshengyereza
verses:
Yesu, ninkweshengyereza
Obanz’ onyegyese hati,
Naanye mbone kwegyesa gye
Abari omu mwirima.

Ai Mukam’, onyebembere,
Ondinde ndekye kuhaba,
Naanye mbone kuhabura
Abahabir’ omuhanda.

Ai Mukama, gum’ ondiise
Eby’okurya by’amagara,
Haza naanye ndiis’ abandi
Abain’ enjara y’omwoyo.

Ompamiz’ aha Rukiri,
Ngume mpamiir’ omuriiwe,
Mbone kwih’ abandi bantu
Omu bingonzi by’egi nsi.

songs.title: Ruhang’ akantoorana
verses:
Ruhang’ akantoorana
Ntaine karungi koona,
Yaanyekundira wenka,
Yaanyozyaho ebibi;
Mbwenu nkaamarayo nta
Eibanja ryangye ryona?

Ku ndihik’ omu iguru
Njwair’ okuhikiirira
Okwe, kutari kwangye,
Naareeb’ ezo nkojo ze,
Obwo nibwo ndimanya
Eibanja ryangye ryona.

songs.title: Ai Mukama wangye Yesu
verses:
Ai Mukama wangye Yesu,
Ij’ ogum’ omuriinye
Rukundo yaaw’ enkorese,
Mbone kukuheereza.

Ekigambo kyawe, Yesu,
Kingum’ aha mutima,
Mbone kubinga Sitaane,
Ku araije kundwanisa.

Obusingye bwa Ruhanga
Buntegyekyere kimwe,
Mbone kuhabur’ abandi
Abari omu mwirima.

Okukunda kwawe, Yesu,
Kuunyijurire kimwe;
N’obu ndaajumwe, nkagaywa,
Mukam’, ohimbisibwe.

Nkwatsa, niinyiruk’ empaka
N’amaani n’obumanzi,
Amaisho ngakutaireho,
Ntarikumagamaga.

Oburungi bwawe, Kristo,
Bugume bunshwekire,
Bataba niinye baareba,
Babe niiwe baareeba.

songs.title: Omu mushana gwa Yesu
verses:
Omu mushana gwa Yesu
Nimw’ abajunirwe
Bashang’ okushemererwa
N’obusingye bwingi.

Omu mushana noobaasa
Kugyenda na Yesu,
Ahabw’okub’ omwirima
Guhwaho, gubura.

Omu mushana gwa Yesu
Tihabamu kufa;
Akakuhindur’ eirembo
Ry’okuz’ omu iguru.

Omu mushana gwa Yesu
Tihabamu bwoba;
Twijukye ku yaasingwire
Amaani ga rufu.

Ogyender’ omu mushana
Tagira mwirima,
Ahakub’ omushana gwe
N’ogutarihwaho.

Tugyender’ omu mushana
Nitweteis’ ebibi;
Eshagama y’Omujuni
Etwogyeze kimwe.

songs.title: Iwe Mukristaayo 'we
verses:
Iwe Mukristaayo ’we,
Gum’ otiin’ eby’abandi;
Otagir’ omutima
Mubi gw’okubyetenga.

Byon’ ebitari byawe
Otaribikoraho,
N’obu biraabe bikye
Bitari by’obuguzi.

Ebirikuzibirwa
Otabiruruuhira,
Oyegye kutegyeka
Amaisho n’emikono.

Okub’ ow’amazima
Kand’ okab’ omwesigwa
Nibikir’ obukama
N’obutungi bw’egi nsi.

N’obu orib’ ori omworo,
Ebi oine bikumare,
Obone kuraba gye
Omu ns’ oshemereirwe.

songs.title: Ai Mujuni wangye, Yesu
verses:
Ai Mujuni wangye, Yesu,
Tiinyine ky’okutongana;
Niinyemer’ obukyene bwangye,
Niiw’ oribuntambira.

Kandi ninkwesiga, Yesu,
Na rukundo yaawe nyingi;
Niy’ erigumah’ obutoosha
Omu nsi n’omu iguru.

songs.title: Okukwatanisa kwaitu
verses:
Okukwatanisa kwaitu
Okutari nk’okw’ab’ensi,
Okurug’ omuri rukundo ya Yesu,
Kutuh’ omutima gumwe.

Tugambiran’ eby’obweremwa,
Kandi tubishabirana,
Tuhwerahweran’ emitwaro yaitu ey’-
Ebirikutwita kubi.

Ku tutaan’ omuri egi nsi,
Kitureeter’ obusaasi;
Kwonka tuba tukwataniis’ omu mwoyo,
N’obu tuba turi hare.

Na mbwenu twin’ amatsiko
G’okugaruka kureebana;
Kandi nigo gatureeter’ ekihika
Ky’okureebanir’ omu iguru.

Okwo titurigirirayo
Busaasi n’ekibi kyona,
Kureka turyagirirayo rukundo
N’obumw’ obutarihwaho.

songs.title: Ruhanga wait’ agume naimwe
verses:
Ruhanga wait’ agume naimwe,
Abeebember’ obutoosha,
Abahabur’ omuhanda,
Kand’ abarinde n’obusingye.

Abarind’ omu kabi koona,
Abasinguz’ orugamba,
Abariise bur’ izooba,
Abashwekyes’ amapapa ge.

Kandi n’omu bihikiirizi
Omu bworo n’omu ndwara,
n’omu byosyo bya Sitaane,
Agume naabarwanirira.

Kandi n’aha izooba ry’okufa,
Ebyanyu byona byahweire,
Aryab’ ari hamwe naimwe,
Abahitsy’ omu bukama bwe.
songs.chorus:
Agume hamwe naimwe mwena
Okuhitsy’ obu turireebana,
Okuhitsy’ obu turihika
Omu bukama bwe bw’omu iguru.

songs.title: Ruhang’ ain’ ekishumuruzo
verses:
Ruhang’ ain’ ekishumuruzo ky’ebibaho;
Abandi ku baakukibiika,
Nari yaaba niinye yaakiha,
Obusingye bukaambur’ra.

Kandi niinyesiim’ ahabw’okuba ndi empumi;
Mbwenu ku mba nimbandagira,
Nkor’ aha mukono gwa Yesu,
Mmanya ku ari hamwe naanye.

Tindikubaasa kumanya gye enaama ze;
Kwonk’ eki ndikumanya n’eki,
Niw’ ab’ obuhungiro bwangye
Nkiri omu nsi, nkiri omu nsi.

Mbwen’ ekyo kyonka nikimmara; ka mpuumure!
N’ekya buzima timpweza gye,
Kwonka W’ aryagum’ ampabure
Omuhanda gw’omu iguru.

songs.title: Otwebembere
verses:
Omu mirimo
N’emitwarize,
Ebi okunda ngu tukore
Omu magar’ aga masya,
Haza tubaase
Kubikora gye.

Ku haribaho
Ekintu kyona
Ekyatusaas’ omutima,
Kikatumaramu amaani,
Otweyorekye,
Tukureebe gye.

Abatakwine
Nibasingurwa
Byona, byon’ eby’omu ns’ egi
Eby’engyesho z’omubiri
Ezinurira
Abatakwine.

Tushuuruurire
Eby’omu iguru,
Ebi waaturaganiise;
Otuh’ Omwoy’ Orikwera,
Haza bwanyima
Tuhiky’ owaawe.

songs.title: Ruhanga waitu, oturagye
verses:
Nitukusiim’ ahabw’Engiri
Ei tubuuririirw’ aha,
Ekanyis’ ebyana birungi
Omu mitima yaitu twena;
Ogume naitw’ ebiro byona,
Nootukorer’ ebi okunda.

songs.title: Imw’ abaana ba Yesu
verses:
Imw’ abaana ba Yesu,
Nimumweshongorere,
Kandi mumusingize,
Muhimbis’ eiziina rye.

Turi omu rugyendo
Rw’okutaah’ omu iguru,
Ei aba ira baagiire
Abaatubandiizeyo.

Imw’ ab’omu busyo bwe
Mwena, muteer’ akaari;
Hakub’ omwanya gwanyu
Gutebeekanisiibwe.

Baana b’omushana ’mwe,
Mwimutsy’ amaisho gaanyu,
Orurembo Saayuuni
Reeba ruturi haihi.

B’eishe-emwe, mutatiina,
Mwahik’ aha mwatano
Gw’esi nung’ eya Yesu,
Ei yaabacumiire.

Mukama, twaikiriza
Kutsigaho ebi twine
N’okukukuratira,
Ahakub’ otwebembeire.

songs.title: Nyowe ku nshom’ ebigambo
verses:
Nyowe ku nshom’ ebigambo bya Yesu Kristo,
Obu yaataayaayir’ abantu b’omu nsi,
Nyijuka ku yaayaakiire gy’ abaana bato;
Naanye nkaayenzire mbe hamwe nabo.

Kwonka hariho abaana bat’ abaabuzire,
Abatakahurirahoga bya Yesu,
Nyowe nkaayenzire ku bamanya buzima,
Boona ku bainey’ omwanya murungi.
songs.chorus:
Mbwenu hati ntegyereize n’ekihika kingi
Okuhik’ ahari eryo izooba rirungi,
Obu ab’omu nganda zoona bariteerana,
Akabaakiir’, akabah’ omugisha.

songs.title: Obwa ir’ abakazi
verses:
Obwa ir’ abakazi bakaij’ ahari Yesu
Bareetsir’ abaana baabo ngu abah’ omugisha,
Abeegi be baababinga, kwonka Yesu yaabeet’ ati,
Nimureky’ abaana baij’ ahariinye.

Tukaayenzire ngu ab’ omu mahanga goona
Baij’ ahari Yesu, bahurir’ ebigambo bye,
Naabaihirah’ omwirima, nabo bajwerw’ omushana.
Nimureky’ abaana baij’ ahariwe.

songs.title: Yesu Krist’ oba Munywani
verses:
Yesu Krist’ oba Munywani
W’abaana bato,
Ninkushaba ku oba Munywani wangye.

Niinyenda ngu ogum’ okwaits’ omukono gwangye,
Naanye mbone kuguma haihi naiwe.

Onyegyese, nkure nyin’ emicwe mirungi,
Ahabw’ okub’ okab’ omwana nkaanye.

Ninkweteng’ ogume naany’ otarintsigaho,
Okuhitsy’ obu ndirug’ omu ns’ egi.

songs.title: Omu iguru hariy’ Enkunzi
verses:
Omu iguru hariy’ Enkunzi
Y’abaana bato boona,
Otarikuhindahinduka
Akabahararuka.
Omukago gwe ti nk’ogw’abantu
Ogumarwaho busha;
Eryo iziina Nkunzi y’abaana
Rimushemereire gye.

Omu iguru hariy’ amaka
G’abaana bato boona,
Agarimu okushemererwa
N’okunanuka kwingi.
Omu maka goon’ ag’omuri egi nsi
Tihariho eri nkayo;
Okwo buri mwan’ otaahayo
Atuur’ ashemereirwe.

Kandi hariyo n’ebirunga
By’abaana bato boona;
Abeesig’ Omujuni Yesu
Nibo baribijwara.
N’ebirung’ ebitarihunduuka
Ebi Yesu aribaha,
Ahakuba bakamukunda
Okuhitsy’ aha kufa.

Abo baana ku barihika
Omu nsi y’omu iguru,
Baryaguma nibeeshongora
Ekyeshongoro kisya
Ekirirema baamaraika
Okukyeshongora gye;
Ahakuba tibararwaine
Ngamba z’omuri egi nsi.

Kandi hariyo n’ebijwaro
By’abaana bato boona,
N’enanga nungi z’okuteera
Ezirikujumeera.
Ebyo byona ebi mwahurira
Bishangw’ omuri Yesu.
N’ahabw’ekyo mwije tweheyo,
Tubone kubiheebwa.

songs.title: Baibuli nengambira
verses:
Baibuli nengambira
Yesu ku arikunkunda;
Itw’ abaana turi abe,
Kandi nitukihamya.

Yes’ ogw’ akatufeera
Aha muti gw’enshoni,
Yaatwigurir’ orwigi
Rw’eirembo ry’omu iguru.

Turi ab’amaani makye,
Kwonka We n’ow’amaani;
Naabaasa kuturinda
Omuzigu Sitaane.

Kand’ aryaguma naanye
Omu rugyendo rwangye;
Ku ndifa nimmukunda,
Aryantaasy’ omu iguru.
songs.chorus:
Yesu nankunda
Yesu nankunda
Yesu nankunda,
Niwe yanfeereire.

songs.title: Ai Yes’ omucureezi
verses:
Ai Yes’ omucureezi
Nyow’ omwana waaw’ omuto
Ondeebe n’embabazii,
Mbone kwij’ ahariiwe.

Yesu Mwana gw’entaama,
Ombeer’ eky’okureeberaho;
Iw’ owaabair’ omwana,
Ompindure mbe nkaiwe.

Kandi omp’ omutima
Gw’okworober’ abanzaire;
Iw’ ogir’ embabazi,
Omp’ okukunda kwawe.

Ahabw’obweremwa bwangye
Mbwen’ ekyo ninkibaasa nta?
Niiw’ oraakimbaasise
Ahabw’ Omwoyo waawe.

Yes’ Omunyarukundo,
