Naaz’ omu mikono yaawe,
Naiw’ ogum’ omuriinye,
Mbone kukuheereza.

songs.title: Yes’ Omuriis’ omurungi
Yesu Muriisa wangye
verses:
Yesu Muriisa wangye,
Ndi entaama yaaw’, ondinde;
Tihain’ orikubaasa
Kwija, akakuunyaka.

Okabambw’ aha Muti;
Na hat’ engaro zaawe
Z’embabazi zikiine
Enkojo z’emisumaari.

Mbwenu ka nkusingize,
Ngume ninkworobera;
Kandi nshemerererwe
Rukund’ ei onyiniire.

Yesu, gum’ onyegyese
Kuhur’r’ eiraka ryawe;
Ogwo muhanda gwawe
Ndekye kugurugamu.

Mukam’ ogum', onyebembere,
Naanye nkukuratire,
Okuhitsy’ obu ndihika
Omu maisho ga Tataitwe.

songs.title: Imwe baana 'mwe
verses:
Imwe baana ’mwe, nimwije tusiime
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu,
Mwena mwena, mwije tumusiime,
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu.
Imwe baana ’mwe, mwije tumuramye Yesu Nkunzi yaitu. (x 2)
Imwe baana ’mwe, mwije tumushabe, Yesu Nkunzi yaitu. (x 2)

Kandi twena tugume tumukunde
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu;
Twena twena tugume tumukunde
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu.

Kandi tumureeter’ emitoijo
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu
Tumureeter’ emitoijo yaitu,
Yesu Nkunzi yaitu.
Tugume tuheereze Mukama Yesu Nkunzi yaitu. (x 2)

songs.title: Yesu, obu waazaarwa
verses:
Yesu, obu waazaarwa, nyok’ akakubyama
Obu bwato bw’ente, ahabw’ okubur’ ahandi;
Baakwarir’ ahatakushemereire, Mukama,
Haza waabair’ ori Omuhangi w’ensi zoona.

Imwe baana ’mwe mwena, nimuhurir’ ente
Nizijuga; kandi Omwana yaasisiimuka.
Mbwen’ ogwo Mwana Yesu, ka tumuhimbise,
Ahabw’okuzaarw’ atyo, ngu atujune twena.

Mbwenu Mukama waitu Yesu, ninkushaba,
Ku oguma haihi naanye obutwire bwona;
Kandi n’abandi baana, obah’ omugisha,
Bakukunde munong’ ebiro byabo byona.

songs.title: Niinyesiim’ ahakuba Tataitwe
verses:
Niinyesiim’ ahakuba Tataitwe
Akatworek’ eby’okukunda kwe,
Obu yaagir’ omu kitabo kye
Ekirikwera ngu Yes’ ankunda.

Ku mpaba nti, naamugwisa kubi,
Eby’okunkunda tibimurusya;
Ekinkwatsa kumugarukaho
Nikwo kwijuka ngu Yes’ ankunda.

Ku ndihik’ owaitu omu iguru
Nibwo ndibuuz’ eki yankundiire,
Haza nkaguma niinyeshongora
Eby’okukunda kwe kw’okutangaaza.

Yesu nankunda, naanye mmukunda
Ahabw’okunfeer’ aha musharaba
Ekyo nikyo kirikumpamiza,
Ntabangaanise ku arikunkunda.
songs.chorus:
Nimmusiim’ ahabw’okunkunda
Esh’ ankunda! 
Esh’ ankunda!
Nimmusiim’ ahabw’okunkunda,
Haza ndi omusiisi.

songs.title: Yesu akatwet’ etabaaza ze
verses:
Yesu akatwet’ etabaaza ze
Okumurikir’ ab’omu mwirima;
Omu ns’egi tworeky’ omushana gwe,
Iwe ah’ otwire, naany’ ahu ndi.

Ka tubanze kworek’ omushana
Okuhais’ Eiziina ry’ ekitiinisa,
Omushana gwaitu gumugwise gye,
Iwe ah’ otwire, naany’ ahu ndi.

Kandi tumurikir’ ab’owaitu,
Abari omu naku n’ebibi bingi;
Hati mbwenu ka tubamurikire,
Iwe ah’ otwire, naany’ ahu ndi.

songs.title: Mutakora kubi
verses:
Mutakora kubi
Mutaritongana;
Muri aba Ruhanga,
Baana ba Yesu.

Krist’ Omucureezi
Tagira kamogo;
Naimwe mwen’ abaana be,
Mutwaze nkawe.

Omubi Sitaane
Hat’ abagwereire,
Naayenda kuboosya
Kubacumuza.

Mutarimworobera
N’obu muraaremwe
Okurwana nawe,
Muhungy’ ekibi.

Mukaraganisa
Kwimuura Sitaane
N’emicwe ye yoona,
Okugireka.

Mukazaarwa Kristo
Omujuni waanyu,
Mugume mwezirikye
Kumuheereza.

Mukama waany’ ogwo
Tagira kabara;
Naimw’ abaana be mube
Abarikwera.

songs.title: Orugo rwa Yeriko
verses:
Orugo rwa Yeriko rugumire
Twena nituruziguuruka,
Orugo rwa Yeriko rugumire
Bur’ izoob’ omurundi gumwe.

Aha rw’omushanju orwo rugo
Rwa Yeriko, rwa Yeriko,
Nitwija kuruziguuruka
Hoon’ emirundi mushanju.

Bwanyim’ orwo rugo rwa Yeriko
Rwa Yeriko, rwa Yeriko
Rwakumbagara, rwagwera kimwe
Ery’ izooba, omu kasheeshe.

songs.title: Yes’ ow’obushoboorozi
verses:
Yes’ ow’obushoboorozi
Oin’ okusaasira
Kand’ ow’embabazi nyingi,
Twaija kukushaba.

Yesu, nitukureetera
Ab’enganda zaitu,
Abagiir’ omu rugamba
Kuturwanirira.

Yes’, obarind’ omu kabi,
Bagume bari gye,
Bakwesigy’ omuri byona,
Ebi barikukora.

Otaribatsiga bonka;
Ku barishoberwa,
Iwe wenk’ ogume nabo,
Otabarugaho.

Obah’ omutima gumwe,
Bagir’ enaam’ emwe,
Babone kutung’ amaani,
Kandi basingure.

songs.title: Ai Ruhanga, gum’ orinde
verses:
Kandi n’abazaire baabo
Bahuumuz’ omutima,
Barekye kuhw’ amatsiko,
Mukama, bakwesigye;
Bagume bashemereirwe,
Kandi bagir’ obusingye.

Ai Mujuni, n’tukushaba,
Marah’ oru rugamba,
Kand’ ogarur’ obusingye,
Abantu bakundane;
Ahabw’embabazi zaawe
Boona bagarukane gye.

songs.title: Omwoyo N'omubiri
verses:
Yes' Omucunguzi
Nyesig' Eiziina ryawe;
Nk' oku waaraganiise,
Kibe nikwo kyaba.

Toor' amagara gangye
Agu waafeereire;
Ka ndwanise Sitaane
Mbe omusinguzi.

Ku ndihik' omu iguru
Ndyasiima Mukama
Owacungwir' amagara
gangy' omu kufa.

songs.title: Nitukuramya Mukama Ruhanga
verses:
Nitukuramya, Mukama Ruhanga,
Tataitw'Omwana n'Omwoyo,
N'okushemererwa nitukusiima,
Ahabw' ebi otukoreire;

Omu kasheeshe, eihangwe n'ekiro,
Ogum' otubumbatiire,
Okukunda kwawe tikuhinduka,
N'obu tukugwisa kubi;

Ebi wahangire n' obwengye bwawe,
Amayanja n' ezo nshozi,
Enyonyi z'omu mwanya n' enyamaishwa,
Byona n'eby'okutangaaza;

Ku tushoberwa twarimbagirirwa,
Tukwet' otuhuumuriza,
Omu bujune, obworo n'enjara,
Tobura kutubangira;

Ka tukuhimbise Ruhanga waitu,
Ka tukuh'ekitiinisa,
Ab'omu iguru naitw' abari omu nsi,
Tuhimbis'Eizina ryawe;
songs.chorus:
Nitukushaba gum' oturinzire,
Otukwatiriire,
Haza ku turirug'omuri'egi nsi,
Tube naiw' ebiro byona.

songs.title: Itwe na byon' eby'omu nsi
verses:
Itwe na byon' eby'omu nsi
Ka tuhimbise Ruhanga;
Aleluya! Aleluya!
Naimw' amahe g'omu iguru,
Musiime Ruhanga waitu,
Tataitwe n'Omwana
N'Omwoy' Orikwera;
Aleluya! Aleluya!

songs.title: Uganda National Anthem
verses:
O Uganda! May God uphold thee!
We lay our future in thy hand
United, free;
For Liberty
Together we’ll always stand.

O, Uganda! The land of freedom
Our love and labour we give,
And with neighbours all,
At our country’s call
In peace and friendship we’ll live.

O Uganda! The land that feeds us
By sun and fertile soil grown,
For our own dear land
We’ll always stand
The Pearl of Africa’s Crown.

songs.title: East African Anthem
verses:
Ee Mungu twaomba ulinde
Jumuiya Afrika Mashariki
Tuwezeshe kuishi kwa amani
Tutimize na malengo yetu.

Uzalendo pia mshikamano
Viwe msingi wa Umoja wetu
Natulinde Uhuru na Amani
Mila zetu na desturi zetu.

Viwandani na hata mashambani
Tufanye kazi sote kwa makini
Tujitoe kwa hali na mali
Tuijenge Jumuiya bora.
songs.chorus:
Jumuiya Yetu sote tuilinde
Tuwajibike tuimarike
Umoja wetu ni nguzo yetu
Idumu Jumuiya yetu.

songs.title: Ankole Diocese Anthem
verses:
Ai Ruhanga Tataitwe, Omwana n’Omwoyo
Nitukusiimir’Obureeberezi bw’Ankole
Niiw’ otuh’ enjura n’omushana tukeez’ ebyokurya, 
Amagara, amaka n’emirimo n’tubikusiimira

Itw’ Abakristaayo abakuru n’abato
Ka tukwatanise tukorere entunguuka
Tubuurir’ engiri y’amazima, turwanis’ekibi
Omu makanisa n’ebitongore, Yes’ ahimbisibwe
Omu mirimo yaitu n’omu mitwarize Ka twezirikye kuguma turi abeesigwa Baibul’ egume etuhabure, tutariteishuka Ankole Diocese erangaanwe ebiro n’ebiro. AMIINA.

songs.title: Kigezi Diocese Anthem
verses:
Yesu titumanya ogundi mwanya
Ahu tukirir' ebibi byaitu,
Tukaguma twin' okushemererwa
N'eiramizo; N'eiramizo
Omu tuteeranira twena
N'eiramizo n'eiramizo
Omu tuteeranira twena

Okwih' ira tukaba tutamanya
Ebirikukwata aha ngiri,
Hamwe n' amakuru marungi gaayo,
N'okujunwa; N'okujunwa
Tukaimurira kimwe Sitaane
N'okujunwa n'okujunwa
Tukaimurira kimwe Sitaane.

Omujuni atutegir' amatu
Naahurira okurira kwaitu
Kandi naahurir' obusaasi bwaitu
Muhuumure mutatiina
Nimurahukye twena naatweta
Muhuumure mutatiina
Nimurahukye twena naatweta.

songs.title: West Ankole Diocese Anthem
verses:
Ai Ruhanga Nyamuhanga,
Rinda West Ankole yaitu,
Twegyes' okukundana
Nk' oku waatukunzire
Tukunde abantu boona
Turekye okutondana.

Nitwetenga obumwe,
Kandi n'okukwatanisa
Omu mirimo yaitu,
N' omu kuburir' engiri,
Twena tukorere hamwe,
Tutainemu bunyakantu.

Ruhanga Munyambabazi
Otuh'obusingye bwawe,
Tubone kukora gye,
Byon' ebi orikutwendeza
Tuhimbis'Eiziina ryawe,
'Mubureeberezi bwaitu.

Yes'Omwana wa Ruhanga
Twegyes' okugarukana
Nk'oku waatufeereire,
Aha Musharaba gw'enshoni,
Tubone kusaasirana
Tugume tushemereirwe.

Iw'Omwoyo wa Ruhanga,
Niiw'ob'amatsiko gaitu,
Mbwenu tuh' okumanya,
Ku guri omurimo gwaitu
Ogw' okweyemerezaho
Omu myoga yaitu yoona.

songs.title: North Kigezi Diocese Anthem
verses:
Tukusingize Mukama Ruhanga
Omuhangi wa byona
Kandi tukusiime ahabw'ebintu bingi
Ebi otukoreire
N'okukira byona ahabw'okutubeisaho
Kandi okatubaasisa kwija aha er' izooba.

Obwire obu turaamare hanu
Obe naitwe Mukama
Kandi byon' ebirakorerw' omu mwany' ogu
Obibemu Mukama
Haza ekyatureeta nikwo kihikirizibwe
Ebyana ebiraarugemu bikuheis' ekitiinisa.

Bishopu waitu waitu wa North Kigezi
Kandi na Diini waitu
N' Abariisa boon' ab' Obureebereez' obu
Obe nabo Mukama.
Bariisegy' entaama zaaw' ezi baakwasiibwe
Bazooreky'omuhanda gw'okuhik' ahu otuura.

Abakristo b'Ekanisa yaaw' egi
Otuh' Omwoyo waawe
Tutwaze nk' entumwa za Yes' oku zaatweize
Tukorer'omuriiwe.
Tukund' ebi okunda twange byon' ebi oyanga
Ahamuheru gwa byona tutung' eki twashomeire.

songs.title: North Ankole Diocese Anthem
verses:
Ka tusiimeho Ruhanga
Ogw' owaatukunzire
Akatuha North Ankole
Okujun' eihanga rye

Yebare Bishopu waitu
Okwehayo n'amazima
Okareeta entunguuka
Obwegyese omu Bureeberezi

Aba n'abantu ba Mukama
Abahwereir'Ekanisa
Enyomyo na ba Kanoni
Abaahure n'ababuurizi

Mwebare abaishe-emwe mwena
Omurimo gu mukozire
Okwombeka North Ankole
Ekaza ahamutindo

North Ankole nitwesiima
Ahabw'Obureeberezi
Okwiha Enkum' ibiri n' ena
Obutwabukwatsibwa
songs.chorus:
Yebare Iwe Mukama
Omujuni w'abantu boona
Okwijuk' abaana baawe
Okajwis' Omushana

songs.title: South Ankole Diocese Anthem
verses:
Obureeberezi bwa South Ankole,
Ruhang' abuhe omugisha;
Okwebember' abantu be boona
Omumuhanda gw'eiguru
Turyaguma nituramya
Ruhanga Tataitwe n' Omwana
Kandi n'Omwoyo we Orikwera
Okubuzy' Obukama bwe

Abakristo twena tweheireyo
Okwombekyera Ruhanga;
Obureeberezi bw'okuheisa
Eiziina Ry' ekitiinisa
Amatsiko n'obwesigwa
Bituhamy' omu mbabazi ze
Tuhikiirize okwetwa kweitu
'habw'omurimo gutwaheirwe

Obureeberezi bwa South Ankole
Ruhanga akabutoorana
Yaabuh' ebihingwa n' amatungo
N'ebitagata na zaabu
Turyarongoora ki Kristo
Owahikiriiz' endagaano?
Tumuhongyer' emitima yeitu
Ebiro byona. Amiina.

songs.title: Kinkiizi Diocese Anthem
verses:
Abantu ba Kinkiizi twena
Murekye tusiime Nyamuhanga;
Ahabw'Obureeberezi bwaitu,
Tusingiz'eiziina rye.

Eizooba, okwezi n'enyonyoozi,
Biizira omu bunaku bwabyo,
Enjura n'egw' omushana gujwa;
Kinkiiz'okahangwa gye

Emisiri yaitu ku eyera
Abaana baawe barya, bahaaga,
Basheka, bazaana, basiima,
Ogw'Owaakugangire

Ruhanga waitu Nyamuhanga,
Ogume oheebw'ekitiinisa;
Guma orinde Kinkiizi yaawe,
Hati n'ebiro byona.
songs.chorus:
Eshi Kinkiizi (Eshi Kinkiizi)
Okahangwa gye (Okahangwa gye)
Amahamb' enshozi n' emigyera;
Nibihimisa eiziina rye
Ogw'Owaakuhangire

songs.title: East Rwenzori Diocese Anthem
verses:
East Rwenzori ori murungi
Tukwesiimisa
Ai Ruhanga nitukusiima
Ahabwa East Rwenzori

Itwe tuheyo emibiri yaitu
Amaani n' eitungo
Tumuheereze tumaririize
Naw' aryatuh' empeera

Tub' abeesigwa ab'amazima
Ahari Ruhanga
Tugyendere ge mu muhanda gwe
Hati n' ebiro byona
songs.chorus:
Yesu Kristo n'omuhanda
Kandi niwe mazima
Bukomooko bw' amagara
Tumwesigy' obutoosha

songs.title: Uganda Mothers’ Union Anthem
verses:
Mothers’ Union in Uganda
Gathered here Lord in Your Name
Let us all our days together
Be blessed by You oh our God
Give us Grace to match our calling
Lo, the handmaid of the Lord.

Show us how to meet the future
To plan and to act as well
Give us faith, love and patience
Hope and joy in all our ways
To Your world let us boldly say
Lo, the handmaid of the Lord

Glory be to God the Father
Glory be to God the Son
Glory be to God the Spirit
Three in One and One in Three
Rock of ages, our salvation
Lo, the handmaid of the Lord

songs.title: Tukutendereza Yesu
verses:
Tukutendereza Yesu, 
Yesu Oli Mwana gw'endiga: 
Omusaayi gwo gunaazizza; 
Nkwebaza O'Mulokozi.

Edda nafuba bufubi
Okufuna emirembe;
Leero mmaliridde ddala
Okweyabiza Yesu

Nnaababuulira abantu
Obulokozi bwonna
Obutali bwa kitundu
Obulamba obw’obuwa

Nnaategeezanga ebya Yesu
N’obuvumu ne sitya;
Eyanzigya mu busibe
N’okuwonya eyamponya

Neebaza eyannunula nze;
Eyamponya wa kisa!
Yesu ankuuma ansanyusa era
Bulijjo yeebazibwe
